(plain array of nodes).\n285\t            if (Array.isArray(data)) {\n286\t                state.nodes = data;\n287\t            } else if (data && Array.isArray(data.nodes)) {\n288\t              migrationWindow.remainingSecs = data.migration_remaining_secs || null;\n292\t            } else {\n293\t                state.nodes = [];\n294\t            }\n295\t\n296\t            // updateBulkActions();\n302\t\n303\t        } catch (error) {\n304\t            console.error('[FleetPage] Failed to fetch fleet data:', error);\n305\t            showToast('Failed to load fleet data', 'error');\n306\t        }\n307\t    }\n308\t\n309\t    async function fetchLatestFirmware() {\n310\t        try {\n311\t            const response = await fetch('/api/firmware');\n312\t            if (!response.ok) {\n313\t                return; // Firmware endpoint might not be implemented yet\n314\t            }\n315\t\n316\t            const firmware = await response.json();\n317\t            if (firmware && firmware.length > 0) {\n318\t                const latest = firmware.find(f => f.is_latest);\n319\t                if (latest) {\n320\t                    state.latestFirmware = latest.version;\n321\t                }\n322\t            }\n323\t        } catch (error) {\n324\t            console.debug('[FleetPage] Firmware endpoint not available:', error);\n325\t        }\n326\t    }\n327\t\n328\t    function startPolling() {\n329\t        setInterval(() => {\n330\t            fetchFleetData();\n331\t        }, CONFIG.pollIntervalMs);\n332\t    }\n333\t\n334\t    // ============================================\n335\t    // Filtering and Sorting\n336\t    // ============================================\n337\t    function applyFilters() {\n338\t        let filtered = state.nodes.slice();\n339\t\n340\t        // Search filter\n341\t        if (state.filters.search) {\n342\t            const search = state.filters.search.toLowerCase();\n343\t            filtered = filtered.filter(node => {\n344\t                const label = node.name || node.label || '';\n345\t                const mac = node.mac.toLowerCase();\n346\t                return label.toLowerCase().includes(search) || mac.includes(search);\n347\t            });\n348\t        }\n349\t\n350\t        // Status filter\n351\t        if (state.filters.status) {\n352\t            filtered = filtered.filter(node => {\n353\t                return getNodeStatus(node) === state.filters.status;\n354\t            });\n355\t        }\n356\t\n357\t        // Firmware filter\n358\t        if (state.filters.firmware === 'outdated') {\n359\t            filtered = filtered.filter(node => {\n360\t                return isFirmwareOutdated(node);\n361\t            });\n362\t        }\n363\t\n364\t        // Role filter\n365\t        if (state.filters.roles.length > 0) {\n366\t            filtered = filtered.filter(node => {\n367\t                return state.filters.roles.includes(node.role);\n368\t            });\n369\t        }\n370\t\n371\t        // Apply sorting\n372\t        if (state.sortColumn) {\n373\t            filtered.sort((a, b) => {\n374\t                const aVal = getSortValue(a, state.sortColumn);\n375\t                const bVal = getSortValue(b, state.sortColumn);\n376\t\n377\t                let comparison = 0;\n378\t                if (typeof aVal === 'string') {\n379\t                    comparison = aVal.localeCompare(bVal);\n380\t                } else {\n381\t                    comparison = aVal - bVal;\n382\t                }\n383\t\n384\t                return state.sortDirection === 'asc' ? comparison : -comparison;\n385\t            });\n386\t        }\n387\t\n388\t        state.filteredNodes = filtered;\n389\t        renderTable();\n390\t        renderActiveFilters();\n391\t    }\n392\t\n393\t    function getSortValue(node, column) {\n394\t        switch (column) {\n395\t            case 'label':\n396\t                return node.name || node.label || '';\n397\t            case 'mac':\n398\t                return node.mac;\n399\t            case 'status':\n400\t                const status = getNodeStatus(node);\n401\t                // Priority: online > updating > offline\n402\t                return status === 'online' ? 2 : status === 'updating' ? 1 : 0;\n403\t            case 'firmware':\n404\t                return node.firmware_version || '';\n405\t            case 'uptime':\n406\t                return node.uptime_seconds || 0;\n407\t            case 'role':\n408\t                return node.role;\n409\t            case 'health':\n410\t                return node.health_score || 0;\n411\t            case 'packetRate':\n412\t                return node.packet_rate || 0;\n413\t            case 'temperature':\n414\t                return node.temperature || 0;\n415\t            default:\n416\t                return '';\n417\t        }\n418\t    }\n419\t\n420\t    function handleSort(column) {\n421\t        if (state.sortColumn === column) {\n422\t            state.sortDirection = state.sortDirection === 'asc' ? 'desc' : 'asc';\n423\t        } else {\n424\t            state.sortColumn = column;\n425\t            state.sortDirection = 'asc';\n426\t        }\n427\t\n428\t        // Update sort indicators\n429\t        document.querySelectorAll('th.sortable').forEach(th => {\n430\t            th.classList.remove('sort-asc', 'sort-desc');\n431\t            if (th.dataset.sort === column) {\n432\t                th.classList.add(state.sortDirection === 'asc' ? 'sort-asc' : 'sort-desc');\n433\t            }\n434\t        });\n435\t\n436\t        applyFilters();\n437\t    }\n438\t\n439\t    function renderActiveFilters() {\n440\t        let filters = [];\n441\t\n442\t        if (state.filters.search) {\n443\t            filters.push({\n444\t                type: 'search',\n445\t                label: `Search: \"${state.filters.search}\"`,\n446\t                value: 'search'\n447\t            });\n448\t        }\n449\t\n450\t        if (state.filters.status) {\n451\t            const label = elements.filterStatus.options[elements.filterStatus.selectedIndex].text;\n452\t            filters.push({\n453\t                type: 'status',\n454\t                label: `Status: ${label}`,\n455\t                value: 'status'\n456\t            });\n457\t        }\n458\t\n459\t        if (state.filters.firmware) {\n460\t            const label = elements.filterFirmware.options[elements.filterFirmware.selectedIndex].text;\n461\t            filters.push({\n462\t                type: 'firmware',\n463\t                label: `Firmware: ${label}`,\n464\t                value: 'firmware'\n465\t            });\n466\t        }\n467\t\n468\t        if (state.filters.roles.length > 0) {\n469\t            filters.push({\n470\t                type: 'roles',\n471\t                label: `Roles: ${state.filters.roles.join(', ')}`,\n472\t                value: 'roles'\n473\t            });\n474\t        }\n475\t\n476\t        if (filters.length === 0) {\n477\t            elements.activeFilters.innerHTML = '';\n478\t            elements.toolbar.style.display = 'none';\n479\t            return;\n480\t        }\n481\t\n482\t        elements.toolbar.style.display = 'block';\n483\t        elements.activeFilters.innerHTML = filters.map(f => `\n484\t            <span class=\"filter-chip\" data-filter-type=\"${f.type}\">\n485\t                ${f.label}\n486\t                <span class=\"filter-dismiss\" data-filter=\"${f.value}\">&times;</span>\n487\t            </span>\n488\t        `).join('');\n489\t\n490\t        // Add dismiss handlers\n491\t        elements.activeFilters.querySelectorAll('.filter-dismiss').forEach(btn => {\n492\t            btn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {\n493\t                e.stopPropagation();\n494\t                clearFilter(btn.dataset.filter);\n495\t            });\n496\t        });\n497\t    }\n498\t\n499\t    function clearFilter(filterType) {\n500\t        switch (filterType) {\n501\t            case 'search':\n502\t                elements.searchInput.value = '';\n503\t                state.filters.search = '';\n504\t                break;\n505\t            case 'status':\n506\t                elements.filterStatus.value = '';\n507\t                state.filters.status = '';\n508\t                break;\n509\t            case 'firmware':\n510\t                elements.filterFirmware.value = '';\n511\t                state.filters.firmware = '';\n512\t                break;\n513\t            case 'roles':\n514\t                Array.from(elements.filterRole.options).forEach(opt => opt.selected = false);\n515\t                state.filters.roles = [];\n516\t                break;\n517\t        }\n518\t        applyFilters();\n519\t    }\n520\t\n521\t    // ============================================\n522\t    // Table Rendering\n523\t    // ============================================\n524\t    function renderTable() {\n525\t        const { filteredNodes, selectedNodes } = state;\n526\t        const { tableBody, emptyState } = elements;\n527\t\n528\t        // Show empty state if no nodes\n529\t        if (filteredNodes.length === 0) {\n530\t            tableBody.innerHTML = '';\n531\t            emptyState.style.display = 'block';\n532\t            return;\n533\t        }\n534\t\n535\t        emptyState.style.display = 'none';\n536\t\n537\t        // Render rows\n538\t        tableBody.innerHTML = filteredNodes.map(node => {\n539\t            const isSelected = selectedNodes.has(node.mac);\n540\t            const status = getNodeStatus(node);\n541\t            const isOutdated = isFirmwareOutdated(node);\n542\t            const healthClass = getHealthClass(node.health_score);\n543\t            const healthPercent = Math.round((node.health_score || 0) * 100);\n544\t            const packetRateClass = getPacketRateClass(node);\n545\t            const tempClass = getTemperatureClass(node.temperature);\n546\t\n547\t            return `\n548\t                <tr class=\"fleet-row${isSelected ? ' selected' : ''}\" data-mac=\"${node.mac}\">\n549\t                    <td class=\"col-checkbox\">\n550\t                        <input type=\"checkbox\" class=\"checkbox node-checkbox\"\n551\t                               data-mac=\"${node.mac}\"${isSelected ? ' checked' : ''}>\n552\t                    </td>\n553\t                    <td class=\"col-label\">\n554\t                        <div class=\"node-label\" data-mac=\"${node.mac}\" title=\"Double-click to edit\">\n555\t                            ${escapeHtml(node.name || node.label || 'Unnamed')}\n556\t                        </div>\n557\t                    </td>\n558\t                    <td class=\"col-mac\">\n559\t                        <span class=\"mac-address mac-tooltip\" title=\"${node.mac}\">\n560\t                            ${truncateMAC(node.mac)}\n561\t                        </span>\n562\t                    </td>\n563\t                    <td class=\"col-status\">\n564\t                        <span class=\"status-badge ${status}\">\n565\t                            <span class=\"status-dot\"></span>\n566\t                            ${capitalize(status)}\n567\t                        </span>\n568\t                        ${node.unpaired ? '<span class=\"node-unpaired-badge\">UNPAIRED</span>' : ''}\n569\t                    </td>\n570\t                    <td class=\"col-firmware\">\n571\t                        <div class=\"firmware-version\">\n572\t                            <span class=\"${isOutdated ? 'firmware-outdated' : 'firmware-current'}\">\n573\t                                ${escapeHtml(node.firmware_version || '--')}\n574\t                            </span>\n575\t                            ${isOutdated ? `\n576\t                                <span class=\"firmware-indicator\">\n577\t                                    <span class=\"firmware-arrow\">&rarr;</span>\n578\t                                    ${escapeHtml(state.latestFirmware || '?')}\n579\t                                </span>\n580\t                            ` : ''}\n581\t                        </div>\n582\t                    </td>\n583\t                    <td class=\"col-uptime\">\n584\t                        ${formatUptime(node.uptime_seconds)}\n585\t                    </td>\n586\t                    <td class=\"col-role\">\n587\t                        <span class=\"role-badge ${node.role}\">${formatRole(node.role)}</span>\n588\t                    </td>\n589\t                    <td class=\"col-health\">\n590\t                        <div class=\"health-bar-container\">\n591\t                            <div class=\"health-bar\">\n592\t                                <div class=\"health-bar-fill ${healthClass}\" style=\"width: ${healthPercent}%\"></div>\n593\t                            </div>\n594\t                            <span class=\"health-value\">${healthPercent}%</span>\n595\t                        </div>\n596\t                    </td>\n597\t                    <td class=\"col-packet-rate\">\n598\t                        <span class=\"packet-rate ${packetRateClass}\">\n599\t                            ${formatPacketRate(node)}\n600\t                        </span>\n601\t                    </td>\n602\t                    <td class=\"col-temperature\">\n603\t                        <span class=\"temperature ${tempClass}\">\n604\t                            ${formatTemperature(node.temperature)}\n605\t                        </span>\n606\t                    </td>\n607\t                    <td class=\"col-actions\">\n608\t                        <div class=\"action-buttons\">\n609\t                            ${node.unpaired ? `\n610\t                                <button class=\"action-btn btn-reprovision\" data-mac=\"${node.mac}\"\n611\t                                        title=\"Re-provision credentials\">\n612\t                                    &#x21BA; Pair\n613\t                                </button>\n614\t                            ` : ''}\n615\t                            <button class=\"action-btn btn-locate\" data-mac=\"${node.mac}\"\n616\t                                    title=\"Locate (flash LED)\" ${status !== 'online' ? 'disabled' : ''}>\n617\t                                &#x26A1;\n618\t                            </button>\n619\t                            <button class=\"action-btn btn-ota\" data-mac=\"${node.mac}\"\n620\t                                    title=\"Update Firmware\" ${!isOutdated ? 'disabled' : ''}>\n621\t                                &#x2191;\n622\t                            </button>\n623\t                            <button class=\"action-btn btn-flyto\" data-mac=\"${node.mac}\"\n624\t                                    title=\"Fly to Node\">\n625\t                                &#x26F6;\n626\t                            </button>\n627\t                            <button class=\"action-btn btn-more\" data-mac=\"${node.mac}\"\n628\t                                    title=\"More Actions\">\n629\t                                &#x2026;\n630\t                            </button>\n631\t                        </div>\n632\t                    </td>\n633\t                </tr>\n634\t            `;\n635\t        }).join('');\n636\t\n637\t        // Bind row events\n638\t        bindRowEvents();\n639\t    }\n640\t\n641\t    function bindRowEvents() {\n642\t        // Checkbox handlers\n643\t        document.querySelectorAll('.node-checkbox').forEach(checkbox => {\n644\t            checkbox.addEventListener('change', (e) => {\n645\t                const mac = e.target.dataset.mac;\n646\t                if (e.target.checked) {\n647\t                    state.selectedNodes.add(mac);\n648\t                } else {\n649\t                    state.selectedNodes.delete(mac);\n650\t                }\n651\t                updateBulkActions();\n652\t                renderTable(); // Re-render to update selected state\n653\t            });\n654\t        });\n655\t\n656\t        // Row click for fly-to\n657\t        document.querySelectorAll('.fleet-row').forEach(row => {\n658\t            row.addEventListener('click', (e) => {\n659\t                // Don't trigger if clicking on checkbox, actions, or label\n660\t                if (e.target.closest('.checkbox') ||\n661\t                    e.target.closest('.action-buttons') ||\n662\t                    e.target.closest('.node-label')) {\n663\t                    return;\n664\t                }\n665\t                const mac = row.dataset.mac;\n666\t                flyToNode(mac);\n667\t            });\n668\t        });\n669\t\n670\t        // Label double-click for inline edit\n671\t        document.querySelectorAll('.node-label').forEach(labelEl => {\n672\t            labelEl.addEventListener('dblclick', (e) => {\n673\t                e.stopPropagation();\n674\t                const mac = labelEl.dataset.mac;\n675\t                startLabelEdit(labelEl, mac);\n676\t            });\n677\t        });\n678\t\n679\t        // Re-provision button (unpaired nodes only)\n680\t        document.querySelectorAll('.btn-reprovision').forEach(btn => {\n681\t            btn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {\n682\t                e.stopPropagation();\n683\t                const mac = btn.dataset.mac;\n684\t                // Navigate to live page which loads the onboard wizard;\n685\t                // the query param triggers re-provision mode automatically.\n686\t                window.location.href = '/live?reprovision=' + encodeURIComponent(mac);\n687\t            });\n688\t        });\n689\t\n690\t        // Action buttons\n691\t        document.querySelectorAll('.btn-locate').forEach(btn => {\n692\t            btn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {\n693\t                e.stopPropagation();\n694\t                const mac = btn.dataset.mac;\n695\t                identifyNode(mac);\n696\t            });\n697\t        });\n698\t\n699\t        document.querySelectorAll('.btn-ota').forEach(btn => {\n700\t            btn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {\n701\t                e.stopPropagation();\n702\t                const mac = btn.dataset.mac;\n703\t                showOTAModal(mac);\n704\t            });\n705\t        });\n706\t\n707\t        document.querySelectorAll('.btn-flyto').forEach(btn => {\n708\t            btn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {\n709\t                e.stopPropagation();\n710\t                const mac = btn.dataset.mac;\n711\t                flyToNode(mac);\n712\t            });\n713\t        });\n714\t\n715\t        document.querySelectorAll('.btn-more').forEach(btn => {\n716\t            btn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {\n717\t                e.stopPropagation();\n718\t                const mac = btn.dataset.mac;\n719\t                showMoreActions(btn, mac);\n720\t            });\n721\t        });\n722\t    }\n723\t\n724\t    // ============================================\n725\t    // Inline Label Edit\n726\t    // ============================================\n727\t    function startLabelEdit(element, mac) {\n728\t        const currentValue = element.textContent;\n729\t        const node = state.nodes.find(n => n.mac === mac);\n730\t        const existingLabel = node.name || node.label || '';\n731\t\n732\t        element.contentEditable = true;\n733\t        element.classList.add('editing');\n734\t        element.textContent = existingLabel;\n735\t\n736\t        // Focus and select all text\n737\t        element.focus();\n738\t\n739\t        const range = document.createRange();\n740\t        range.selectNodeContents(element);\n741\t        const selection = window.getSelection();\n742\t        selection.removeAllRanges();\n743\t        selection.addRange(range);\n744\t\n745\t        const handleBlur = async () => {\n746\t            element.removeEventListener('blur', handleBlur);\n747\t            element.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKeydown);\n748\t\n749\t            const newValue = element.textContent.trim();\n750\t            element.contentEditable = false;\n751\t            element.classList.remove('editing');\n752\t\n753\t            // Validate\n754\t            if (newValue.length > 32) {\n755\t                showToast('Label must be 32 characters or less', 'warning');\n756\t                element.textContent = currentValue;\n757\t                return;\n758\t            }\n759\t\n760\t            if (newValue === currentValue) {\n761\t                // No change\n762\t                element.textContent = currentValue;\n763\t                return;\n764\t            }\n765\t\n766\t            // Save to server\n767\t            try {\n768\t                const response = await fetch(`/api/nodes/${mac}/label`, {\n769\t                    method: 'PATCH',\n770\t                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n771\t                    body: JSON.stringify({ label: newValue })\n772\t                });\n773\t\n774\t                if (!response.ok) {\n775\t                    throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}`);\n776\t                }\n777\t\n778\t                // Update local state\n779\t                const nodeIndex = state.nodes.findIndex(n => n.mac === mac);\n780\t                if (nodeIndex !== -1) {\n781\t                    state.nodes[nodeIndex].name = newValue;\n782\t                    state.nodes[nodeIndex].label = newValue;\n783\t                }\n784\t\n785\t                showToast('Label updated', 'success');\n786\t                applyFilters();\n787\t\n788\t            } catch (error) {\n789\t                console.error('[FleetPage] Failed to update label:', error);\n790\t                showToast('Failed to update label', 'error');\n791\t                element.textContent = currentValue;\n792\t            }\n793\t        };\n794\t\n795\t        const handleKeydown = (e) => {\n796\t            if (e.key === 'Enter') {\n797\t                e.preventDefault();\n798\t                element.blur();\n799\t            } else if (e.key === 'Escape') {\n800\t                e.preventDefault();\n801\t                element.textContent = currentValue;\n802\t                element.blur();\n803\t            }\n804\t        };\n805\t\n806\t        element.addEventListener('blur', handleBlur);\n807\t        element.addEventListener('keydown', handleKeydown);\n808\t    }\n809\t\n810\t    // ============================================\n811\t    // Bulk Actions\n812\t    // ============================================\n813\t    function toggleSelectAll(checked) {\n814\t        state.filteredNodes.forEach(node => {\n815\t            if (checked) {\n816\t                state.selectedNodes.add(node.mac);\n817\t            } else {\n818\t                state.selectedNodes.delete(node.mac);\n819\t            }\n820\t        });\n821\t        updateBulkActions();\n822\t        renderTable();\n823\t    }\n824\t\n825\t    function clearSelection() {\n826\t        state.selectedNodes.clear();\n827\t        updateBulkActions();\n828\t        renderTable();\n829\t    }\n830\t\n831\t    function updateBulkActions() {\n832\t        const count = state.selectedNodes.size;\n833\t        elements.bulkSelectedCount.textContent = count;\n834\t        elements.selectAllCheckbox.checked = count > 0 && count === state.filteredNodes.length;\n835\t        elements.bulkActionsBar.style.display = count > 0 ? 'block' : 'none';\n836\t\n837\t        // Update button states\n838\t        const hasOutdated = Array.from(state.selectedNodes).some(mac => {\n839\t            const node = state.nodes.find(n => n.mac === mac);\n840\t            return node && isFirmwareOutdated(node);\n841\t        });\n842\t        elements.bulkOtaBtn.disabled = !hasOutdated;\n843\t    }\n844\t\n845\t    // ============================================\n846\t    // Node Actions\n847\t    // ============================================\n848\t    async function identifyNode(mac) {\n849\t        try {\n850\t            showToast('Sending identify command...', 'info');\n851\t\n852\t            const response = await fetch(`/api/nodes/${mac}/identify`, {\n853\t                method: 'POST',\n854\t                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n855\t                body: JSON.stringify({ duration_ms: 5000 })\n856\t            });\n857\t\n858\t            if (!response.ok) {\n859\t                throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}`);\n860\t            }\n861\t\n862\t            showToast(`Identifying ${formatMAC(mac)}`, 'success');\n863\t\n864\t        } catch (error) {\n865\t            console.error('[FleetPage] Identify failed:', error);\n866\t            showToast('Failed to send identify command', 'error');\n867\t        }\n868\t    }\n869\t\n870\t    function flyToNode(mac) {\n871\t        // Store target MAC in localStorage for live view fly-to\n872\t        localStorage.setItem('fleetFlyToMAC', mac);\n873\t\n874\t        // Redirect to live view\n875\t        window.location.href = '/?highlight=' + mac;\n876\t    }\n877\t\n878\t    function showOTAModal(mac) {\n879\t        const node = state.nodes.find(n => n.mac === mac);\n880\t        if (!node) return;\n881\t\n882\t        elements.otaNodeLabel.textContent = node.name || node.label || formatMAC(mac);\n883\t        elements.otaCurrentVersion.textContent = node.firmware_version || 'Unknown';\n884\t        elements.otaLatestVersion.textContent = state.latestFirmware || 'Unknown';\n885\t        elements.otaInfoCurrent.textContent = node.firmware_version || 'Unknown';\n886\t        elements.otaInfoLatest.textContent = state.latestFirmware || 'Unknown';\n887\t        elements.otaInfoStatus.textContent = getNodeStatus(node);\n888\t        elements.otaInfoStatus.className = 'info-value ' + getNodeStatus(node);\n889\t\n890\t        elements.otaModal.dataset.targetMAC = mac;\n891\t        openModal('ota-modal');\n892\t    }\n893\t\n894\t    function showBulkOTAModal() {\n895\t        const macs = Array.from(state.selectedNodes);\n896\t        const outdated = macs.filter(mac => {\n897\t            const node = state.nodes.find(n => n.mac === mac);\n898\t            return node && isFirmwareOutdated(node);\n899\t        });\n900\t\n901\t        if (outdated.length === 0) {\n902\t            showToast('No selected nodes have outdated firmware', 'warning');\n903\t            return;\n904\t        }\n905\t\n906\t        // Show confirmation\n907\t        if (outdated.length === 1) {\n908\t            showOTAModal(outdated[0]);\n909\t        } else {\n910\t            // For multiple nodes, confirm without showing modal\n911\t            if (confirm(`Update ${outdated.length} nodes to firmware ${state.latestFirmware || 'latest'}?`)) {\n912\t                updateMultipleNodes(outdated);\n913\t            }\n914\t        }\n915\t    }\n916\t\n917\t    async function confirmOTA() {\n918\t        const mac = elements.otaModal.dataset.targetMAC;\n919\t        if (!mac) return;\n920\t\n921\t        closeModal('ota-modal');\n922\t\n923\t        try {\n924\t            showToast('Starting firmware update...', 'info');\n925\t\n926\t            const response = await fetch(`/api/nodes/${mac}/ota`, {\n927\t                method: 'POST',\n928\t                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }\n929\t            });\n930\t\n931\t            if (!response.ok) {\n932\t                throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}`);\n933\t            }\n934\t\n935\t            showToast(`Firmware update started for ${formatMAC(mac)}`, 'success');\n936\t            fetchFleetData(); // Refresh to show updating status\n937\t\n938\t        } catch (error) {\n939\t            console.error('[FleetPage] OTA failed:', error);\n940\t            showToast('Failed to start firmware update', 'error');\n941\t        }\n942\t    }\n943\t\n944\t    async function updateMultipleNodes(macs) {\n945\t        try {\n946\t            showToast(`Starting updates for ${macs.length} nodes...`, 'info');\n947\t\n948\t            // Update nodes in sequence with 30s stagger\n949\t            for (let i = 0; i < macs.length; i++) {\n950\t                setTimeout(async () => {\n951\t                    try {\n952\t                        await fetch(`/api/nodes/${macs[i]}/ota`, {\n953\t                            method: 'POST',\n954\t                            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }\n955\t                        });\n956\t\n957\t                        if (i === macs.length - 1) {\n958\t                            showToast(`Firmware updates started for ${macs.length} nodes`, 'success');\n959\t                            fetchFleetData();\n960\t                        }\n961\t                    } catch (error) {\n962\t                        console.error(`[FleetPage] OTA failed for ${macs[i]}:`, error);\n963\t                    }\n964\t                }, i * 30000); // 30 second stagger\n965\t            }\n966\t\n967\t            showToast(`Firmware updates queued for ${macs.length} nodes`, 'info');\n968\t\n969\t        } catch (error) {\n970\t            console.error('[FleetPage] Bulk OTA failed:', error);\n971\t            showToast('Failed to start firmware updates', 'error');\n972\t        }\n973\t    }\n974\t\n975\t    async function updateAllFirmware() {\n976\t        if (!confirm('Update all nodes to the latest firmware?\\n\\nThis will update nodes in sequence with a 30-second gap between each node.')) {\n977\t            return;\n978\t        }\n979\t\n980\t        try {\n981\t            const response = await fetch('/api/nodes/update-all', {\n982\t                method: 'POST',\n983\t                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }\n984\t            });\n985\t\n986\t            if (!response.ok) {\n987\t                throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}`);\n988\t            }\n989\t\n990\t            const data = await response.json();\n991\t            showToast(`Firmware updates started for ${data.count || 0} nodes`, 'success');\n992\t            fetchFleetData();\n993\t\n994\t        } catch (error) {\n995\t            console.error('[FleetPage] Update all failed:', error);\n996\t            showToast('Failed to start firmware updates', 'error');\n997\t        }\n998\t    }\n999\t\n1000\t    async function rebaselineAll() {\n1001\t        if (!confirm('Re-baseline all links?\\n\\nThis will reset all link baselines. Make sure the space is empty during the 60-second calibration window.')) {\n1002\t            return;\n1003\t        }\n1004\t\n1005\t        try {\n1006\t            showToast('Starting re-baseline }\n1300\t\n1301\t    async function handleMoreAction(action, mac) {\n1302\t        const node = state.nodes.find(n => n.mac === mac);\n1303\t        if (!node) return;\n1304\t\n1305\t        switch ============================================\n1337\t    function downloadCSV() {\n1338\t        const headers = [\n1339\t            'MAC',\n1340\t            'Label',\n1341\t            'Status',\n1342\t            'Firmware Version',\n1343\t            'Uptime (s)',\n1344\t            'Role',\n1345\t            'Health Score',\n1346\t            'Packet Rate (Hz)',\n1347\t (node.health_score || 0).toFixed(2),\n1359\t            node.packet_rate || 0,\n1360\t            node.temperature || '',\n1361\t            new Date(node.last_seen_ms || 0).toISOString()\n1362\t updateSummary() {\n1386\t        const total = state.nodes.length;\n1387\t        const online = state.nodes.filter(n => getNodeStatus(n) === 'online').length;\n1388\t        const unpaired = state.nodes.filter(n => n.unpaired).length;\n1389\t\n1390\t        elements.totalSummary.textContent = total;\n1391\t        elements.onlineSummary.textContent = online;\n1392\t\n1393\t        //               const bannerLink = elements.unpairedBanner.querySelector('.banner-action');\n1417\t                if (bannerLink) {\n1418\t                    bannerLink.href = '/live';\n1419\t                    bannerLink.textContent = 'Open Setup';\n1420\t                }\n1421\t                bannerText += ' — use the Pair button on each node below';\n1422\t            }\n1423\t            if (migrationWindow.active && migrationWindow.remainingSecs !== null) {\n1424\t                const hours = Math.floor(migrationWindow.remainingSecs / 3600);\n1425\t                const mins = Math.floor((migrationWindow.remainingSecs % 3600) / 60);\n1426\t                if (hours > 0) {\n1427\t                    bannerText += ' (migration window: ' + hours + 'h ' + mins + 'm remaining)';\n1428\t                } else {\n1429\t                    bannerText += ' (migration window: ' + mins + 'm remaining)';\n1430\t                }\n1431\t            } else if elements.unpairedBannerText.textContent = bannerText;\n1435\t            elements.unpairedBanner.style.display = '';\n1436\t        } else {\n1437\t            elements.unpairedBanner.style.display = 'none';\n1438\t        }\n1439\t    }\n1440\t\n1441\t    // ============================================\n1442\t    // Helper Functions\n1443\t    // ============================================\n1444\t    function getNodeStatus(node) {\n1445\t        // Check if node is unpaired (connected without valid credentials)\n1446\t        if (node.unpaired) {\n1447\t            return 'unpaired';\n1448\t        }\n1449\t\n1450\t        // Check if node is currently updating\n1451\t        if (node.ota_in_progress) {\n1452\t            return 'updating';\n1453\t        }\n1454\t\n1455\t        // Check if online (last seen within threshold)\n1456\t        if (node.last_seen_ms) {\n1457\t            const lastSeen = new Date(node.last_seen_ms);\n1458\t            const now = new Date();\n1459\t            const diff = now - lastSeen;\n1460\t\n1461\t            if (diff < CONFIG.staleThresholdMs) {\n1462\t                return 'online';\n1463\t            }\n1464\t        }\n1465\t\n1466\t        return 'offline';\n1467\t    }\n1468\t\n1469\t    function isFirmwareOutdated(node) {\n1470\t        if (!state.latestFirmware || !node.firmware_version) {\n1471\t            return false;\n1472\t        }\n1473\t        return node.firmware_version !== state.latestFirmware;\n1474\t    }\n1475\t\n1476\t    function getHealthClass(score) {\n1477\t        if (score >= 0.7) return 'good';\n1478\t        if (score >= 0.4) return 'fair';\n1479\t        return 'poor';\n1480\t    }\n1481\t\n1482\t    function getPacketRateClass(node) {\n1483\t        const rate = node.packet_rate || 0;\n1484\t        const configured = node.configured_rate || 20;\n1485\t        const ratio = rate / configured;\n1486\t\n1487\t        if (ratio > 0.9) return 'good';\n1488\t        if (ratio > 0.7) return 'fair';\n1489\t        return 'poor';\n1490\t    }\n1491\t\n1492\t    function getTemperatureClass(temp) {\n1493\t        if (!temp) return '';\n1494\t        if (temp > 75) return 'alert';\n1495\t        return '';\n1496\t    }\n1497\t\n1498\t    function formatMAC(mac) {\n1499\t        const parts = mac.split(':');\n1500\t        if (parts.length === 6) {\n1501\t            return parts.slice(0, 4).join(':');\n1502\t        }\n1503\t        return mac;\n1504\t    }\n1505\t\n1506\t    function truncateMAC(mac) {\n1507\t        const parts = mac.split(':');\n1508\t        if (parts.length === 6) {\n1509\t            return parts.slice(0, 3).join(':') + '...';\n1510\t        }\n1511\t        return mac;\n1512\t    }\n1513\t\n1514\t    function formatRole(role) {\n1515\t        const roleMap = {\n1516\t            'tx': 'TX',\n1517\t            'rx': 'RX',\n1518\t            'tx_rx': 'TX-RX',\n1519\t            'passive': 'Passive',\n1520\t            'idle': 'Idle'\n1521\t        };\n1522\t        return roleMap[role] || role;\n1523\t    }\n1524\t\n1525\t    function formatUptime(seconds) {\n1526\t        if (!seconds) return '--';\n1527\t\n1528\t        const days = Math.floor(seconds / 86400);\n1529\t        const hours = Math.floor((seconds % 86400) / 3600);\n1530\t        const minutes = Math.floor((seconds % 3600) / 60);\n1531\t\n1532\t        if (days > 0) {\n1533\t            return `${days}d ${hours}h`;\n1534\t        } else if (hours > 0) {\n1535\t            return `${hours}h ${minutes}m`;\n1536\t        } else {\n1537\t            return `${minutes}m`;\n1538\t        }\n1539\t    }\n1540\t\n1541\t    function formatPacketRate(node) {\n1542\t        const actual = node.packet_rate || 0;\n1543\t        const configured = node.configured_rate || 20;\n1544\t        return `${actual} / ${configured} Hz`;\n1545\t    }\n1546\t\n1547\t    function formatTemperature(temp) {\n1548\t        if (!temp && temp !== 0) return '--';\n1549\t        return `${Math.round(temp)}°C`;\n1550\t    }\n1551\t\n1552\t    function capitalize(str) {\n1553\t        return str.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + str.slice(1);\n1554\t    }\n1555\t\n1556\t    function escapeHtml(str) {\n1557\t        const div = {\n1583\t        const toast = document.createElement('div');\n1584\t        toast.className = `toast ${type}`;\n1585\t\n1586\t        const icons = {\n1587\t            success: '&#x2714;',\n1588\t            error: '&#x2716;',\n1589\t            warning: '&#x26A0;',\n1590\t            info: '&#x2139;'\n1591\t        };\n1592\t\n1593\t        toast.innerHTML = `\n1594\t            <span Fetching\n    // ============================================\n    async function fetchFleetData() {\n        try {\n            const response = await fetch('/api/fleet');\n            if (!response.ok) {\n                throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}: ${response.statusText}`);\n            }\n\n            const data = await response.json();\n\n            // Handle both wrapped response format (with migration window metadata)\n            // and legacy format (plain array of nodes).\n            if (Array.isArray(data)) {\n                state.nodes = data;\n            } else if (data && Array.isArray(data.nodes)) {\n                state.nodes = data.nodes;\n                migrationWindow.active = !!data.migration_window_active;\n state.nodes = [];\n            }\n\n            // Get latest firmware version\n            await fetchLatestFirmware();\n\n            applyFilters();\n            updateSummary();\n }\n    }\n\n    async function fetchLatestFirmware() {\n        try {\n            const response = await fetch('/api/firmware');\n            if (!response.ok) {\n                return; // Firmware endpoint might not be implemented yet\n            }\n\n            const firmware = await response.json();\n            if (firmware && firmware.length > 0) {\n                const latest = firmware.find(f => f.is_latest);\n                if (latest) {\n                    state.latestFirmware = latest.version;\n                }\n            }\n        } catch (error) {\n {\n        let filtered = state.nodes.slice();\n\n        // Search filter\n        if (state.filters.search) {\n            const search = state.filters.search.toLowerCase();\n            filtered = filtered.filter(node => {\n                const label = node.name || node.label || '';\n                const mac = node.mac.toLowerCase();\n                return label.toLowerCase().includes(search) || mac.includes(search);\n            });\n        }\n\n        // Status filter\n        if (state.filters.status) {\n            filtered = filtered.filter(node => {\n                return getNodeStatus(node) === state.filters.status;\n            });\n        }\n\n        // Firmware filter\n        if (state.filters.firmware === 'outdated') {\n            filtered = filtered.filter(node => {\n                return isFirmwareOutdated(node);\n            });\n        }\n\n        // Role filter\n        if (state.filters.roles.length > 0) {\n            filtered = filtered.filter(node => {\n                return state.filters.roles.includes(node.role);\n            });\n        }\n\n        // Apply sorting\n        if (state.sortColumn) {\n            filtered.sort((a, b) => {\n                const aVal = getSortValue(a, state.sortColumn);\n                const bVal = getSortValue(b, state.sortColumn);\n\n                let comparison = 0;\n                if (typeof aVal === 'string') {\n                    comparison = aVal.localeCompare(bVal);\n                } else {\n                    comparison = aVal - bVal;\n                }\n\n                return state.sortDirection === 'asc' ? comparison : -comparison;\n            });\n        }\n\n        state.filteredNodes = filtered;\n        renderTable();\n        renderActiveFilters();\n    }\n\n    function getSortValue(node, column) {\n        switch (column) {\n            case 'label':\n                return node.name || node.label || '';\n            case 'mac':\n                return node.mac;\n            case 'status':\n                const status = getNodeStatus(node);\n                // Priority: online > updating > offline\n                return status === 'online' ? 2 : status === 'updating' ? 1 : 0;\n            case 'firmware':\n                return node.firmware_version || '';\n            case 'uptime':\n                return node.uptime_seconds || 0;\n            case 'role':\n                return node.role;\n            case 'health':\n                return node.health_score || 0;\n            case 'packetRate':\n                return node.packet_rate || 0;\n            case 'temperature':\n                return node.temperature || 0;\n            default:\n                return '';\n        }\n    }\n\n    function handleSort(column) {\n        if (state.sortColumn === column) {\n            state.sortDirection = state.sortDirection === 'asc' ? 'desc' : 'asc';\n        } else {\n            state.sortColumn = column;\n            state.sortDirection = 'asc';\n        }\n\n        // Update sort indicators\n        document.querySelectorAll('th.sortable').forEach(th => {\n            th.classList.remove('sort-asc', 'sort-desc');\n            if (th.dataset.sort === column) {\n                th.classList.add(state.sortDirection === 'asc' ? 'sort-asc' : 'sort-desc');\n            }\n        });\n\n        applyFilters();\n    }\n\n    function renderActiveFilters() {\n        let filters = [];\n\n        if (state.filters.search) {\n            filters.push({\n                type: 'search',\n                label: `Search: \"${state.filters.search}\"`,\n                value: 'search'\n            });\n        }\n\n        if (state.filters.status) {\n            const label = elements.filterStatus.options[elements.filterStatus.selectedIndex].text;\n            filters.push({\n                type: 'status',\n                label: `Status: ${label}`,\n                value: 'status'\n            });\n        }\n\n        if (state.filters.firmware) {\n            const label = elements.filterFirmware.options[elements.filterFirmware.selectedIndex].text;\n            filters.push({\n                type: 'firmware',\n                label: `Firmware: ${label}`,\n                value: 'firmware'\n            });\n        }\n\n        if (state.filters.roles.length > 0) {\n            filters.push({\n                type: 'roles',\n                label: `Roles: ${state.filters.roles.join(', ')}`,\n                value: 'roles'\n            });\n        }\n\n        if (filters.length === 0) {\n            elements.activeFilters.innerHTML = '';\n            elements.toolbar.style.display = 'none';\n            return;\n        }\n\n        elements.toolbar.style.display = 'block';\n        elements.activeFilters.innerHTML = filters.map(f => `\n            <span class=\"filter-chip\" data-filter-type=\"${f.type}\">\n                ${f.label}\n                <span class=\"filter-dismiss\" data-filter=\"${f.value}\">&times;</span>\n            </span>\n        `).join('');\n\n        // Add dismiss handlers\n        elements.activeFilters.querySelectorAll('.filter-dismiss').forEach(btn => {\n            btn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {\n                e.stopPropagation();\n                clearFilter(btn.dataset.filter);\n            });\n        });\n    }\n\n    function clearFilter(filterType) {\n        switch (filterType) {\n            case 'search':\n                elements.searchInput.value = '';\n                state.filters.search = '';\n                break;\n            case 'status':\n                elements.filterStatus.value = '';\n                state.filters.status = '';\n                break;\n            case 'firmware':\n                elements.filterFirmware.value = '';\n state.filters.roles = [];\n                break;\n        }\n        applyFilters();\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Table Rendering\n    // ============================================\n    function renderTable() {\n        const { filteredNodes, selectedNodes } = state;\n        const { tableBody, emptyState } = elements;\n\n        // Show empty state if no nodes\n        if (filteredNodes.length === 0) {\n            tableBody.innerHTML = '';\n            emptyState.style.display = 'block';\n            return;\n        }\n\n        emptyState.style.display = 'none';\n\n        // Render rows\n        tableBody.innerHTML = filteredNodes.map(node => {\n            const isSelected = selectedNodes.has(node.mac);\n            const status = getNodeStatus(node);\n            const isOutdated = isFirmwareOutdated(node);\n            const healthClass = getHealthClass(node.health_score);\n            const healthPercent = Math.round((node.health_score || 0) * 100);\n            const packetRateClass = getPacketRateClass(node);\n            const tempClass = getTemperatureClass(node.temperature);\n\n            return `\n                <tr class=\"fleet-row${isSelected ? ' selected' : ''}\" data-mac=\"${node.mac}\">\n                    <td class=\"col-checkbox\">\n                        <input type=\"checkbox\" class=\"checkbox node-checkbox\"\n                               data-mac=\"${node.mac}\"${isSelected ? ' checked' : ''}>\n                    </td>\n                    <td class=\"col-label\">\n                        <div class=\"node-label\" data-mac=\"${node.mac}\" title=\"Double-click to edit\">\n                            ${escapeHtml(node.name || node.label || 'Unnamed')}\n                        </div>\n                    </td>\n                    <td class=\"col-mac\">\n                        <span class=\"mac-address mac-tooltip\" title=\"${node.mac}\">\n                            ${truncateMAC(node.mac)}\n                        </span>\n                    </td>\n                    <td class=\"col-status\">\n                        <span class=\"status-badge ${status}\">\n                            <span class=\"status-dot\"></span>\n                            ${capitalize(status)}\n                        </span>\n                        ${node.unpaired ? '<span class=\"node-unpaired-badge\">UNPAIRED</span>' : ''}\n                    </td>\n                    <td class=\"col-firmware\">\n                        <div class=\"firmware-version\">\n                            <span class=\"${isOutdated ?                    </td>\n                </tr>\n            `;\n        }).join('');\n\n        // Bind row events\n        bindRowEvents();\n    }\n\n    function bindRowEvents() {\n        // Checkbox handlers\n        document.querySelectorAll('.node-checkbox').forEach(checkbox => {\n            checkbox.addEventListener('change', (e) => {\n                const mac = e.target.dataset.mac;\n                if (e.target.checked) {\n                    state.selectedNodes.add(mac);\n                } else {\n                    state.selectedNodes.delete(mac);\n                }\n                updateBulkActions();\n                renderTable(); // Re-render to update selected state\n            });\n        });\n\n        // Row click for fly-to\n        document.querySelectorAll('.fleet-row').forEach(row => {\n            row.addEventListener('click', (e) => {\n                // Don't trigger if clicking on checkbox, actions, or label\n                if (e.target.closest('.checkbox') ||\n                    e.target.closest('.action-buttons') ||\n                    e.target.closest('.node-label')) {\n                    return;\n                }\n                const mac = row.dataset.mac;\n                flyToNode(mac);\n            });\n        });\n\n        // Label double-click for inline edit\n        document.querySelectorAll('.node-label').forEach(labelEl => {\n            labelEl.addEventListener('dblclick', (e) => {\n                e.stopPropagation();\n                const mac = document.querySelectorAll('.btn-reprovision').forEach(btn => {\n            btn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {\n                e.stopPropagation();\n                const mac = btn.dataset.mac;\n                // Navigate to live page which loads the onboard wizard;\n                // the query param triggers re-provision mode automatically.\n                window.location.href = '/live?reprovision=' + encodeURIComponent(mac);\n            });\n        });\n\n        // Action buttons\n        document.querySelectorAll('.btn-locate').forEach(btn => {\n            btn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {\n                e.stopPropagation();\n                const mac = btn.dataset.mac;\n                identifyNode(mac);\n            });\n        });\n\n
