       showOTAModal(mac);\n            });\n        });\n\n        document.querySelectorAll('.btn-flyto').forEach(btn => {\n            btn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {\n                e.stopPropagation();\n                const mac = btn.dataset.mac;\n                flyToNode(mac);\n            });\n        });\n\n        document.querySelectorAll('.btn-more').forEach(btn => {\n            btn.addEventListener('click', (e) => {\n                e.stopPropagation();\n                const mac = btn.dataset.mac;\n                showMoreActions(btn, mac);\n            });\n        });\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Inline Label Edit\n    // ============================================\n    function startLabelEdit(element, mac) {\n        const currentValue = element.textContent;\n        const node = state.nodes.find(n => n.mac === mac);\n        const existingLabel = node.name || node.label || '';\n\n        element.contentEditable = true;\n        element.classList.add('editing');\n        element.textContent = existingLabel;\n\n        // Focus and select all text\n        element.focus();\n\n        const range = document.createRange();\n        range.selectNodeContents(element);\n        const selection = window.getSelection();\n        selection.removeAllRanges();\n        selection.addRange(range);\n\n        const handleBlur = async () => {\n            element.removeEventListener('blur', handleBlur);\n            element.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKeydown);\n\n            const newValue = element.textContent.trim();\n            element.contentEditable = false;\n            element.classList.remove('editing');\n\n            // Validate\n            if (newValue.length > 32) {\n                showToast('Label must be 32 characters or less', 'warning');\n                element.textContent = currentValue;\n                return;\n            }\n\n            if (newValue === currentValue) {\n                // No change\n                element.textContent = currentValue;\n                return;\n            }\n\n            // Save to server\n            try {\n                const response = await fetch(`/api/nodes/${mac}/label`, {\n                    method: 'PATCH',\n                    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n                    body: JSON.stringify({ label: newValue })\n                });\n\n                if (!response.ok) {\n                    throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}`);\n                }\n\n                // Update local state\n                const nodeIndex = state.nodes.findIndex(n => n.mac === mac);\n                if (nodeIndex !== -1) {\n                    state.nodes[nodeIndex].name = newValue;\n                    state.nodes[nodeIndex].label = newValue;\n                }\n\n                showToast('Label updated', 'success');\n                applyFilters();\n\n            } catch (error) {\n                console.error('[FleetPage] Failed to update label:', error);\n                showToast('Failed to update label', 'error');\n                element.textContent = currentValue;\n            }\n        };\n\n        const handleKeydown = (e) => {\n            if (e.key === 'Enter') {\n                e.preventDefault();\n                element.blur();\n            } else if (e.key === 'Escape') {\n                e.preventDefault();\n                element.textContent = currentValue;\n                element.blur();\n            }\n        };\n\n        element.addEventListener('blur', handleBlur);\n        element.addEventListener('keydown', handleKeydown);\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Bulk Actions\n    // ============================================\n    function toggleSelectAll(checked) {\n        state.filteredNodes.forEach(node => {\n            if (checked) {\n                state.selectedNodes.add(node.mac);\n            } else {\n                state.selectedNodes.delete(node.mac);\n            }\n        });\n        updateBulkActions();\n        renderTable();\n    }\n\n    function clearSelection() {\n        state.selectedNodes.clear();\n        updateBulkActions();\n        renderTable();\n    }\n\n    function updateBulkActions() {\n        const count = state.selectedNodes.size;\n        elements.bulkSelectedCount.textContent = count;\n        elements.selectAllCheckbox.checked = count > 0 && count === state.filteredNodes.length;\n        elements.bulkActionsBar.style.display = count > 0 ? 'block' : 'none';\n\n        // Update button states\n        const hasOutdated = Array.from(state.selectedNodes).some(mac => {\n            const node = state.nodes.find(n => n.mac === mac);\n            return node && isFirmwareOutdated(node);\n        });\n        elements.bulkOtaBtn.disabled = !hasOutdated;\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Node Actions\n    // ============================================\n    async function identifyNode(mac) {\n        try {\n            showToast('Sending identify command...', 'info');\n\n            const response = await fetch(`/api/nodes/${mac}/identify`, {\n                method: 'POST',\n                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n                body: JSON.stringify({ duration_ms: 5000 })\n            });\n\n            if (!response.ok) {\n                throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}`);\n            }\n\n            showToast(`Identifying ${formatMAC(mac)}`, 'success');\n\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[FleetPage] Identify failed:', error);\n            showToast('Failed to send identify command', 'error');\n        }\n    }\n\n    function flyToNode(mac) {\n        // Store target MAC in localStorage for live view fly-to\n        localStorage.setItem('fleetFlyToMAC', mac);\n\n        // Redirect to live view\n        window.location.href = '/?highlight=' + mac;\n    }\n\n    function showOTAModal(mac) {\n        const node = state.nodes.find(n => n.mac === mac);\n        if (!node) return;\n\n        elements.otaNodeLabel.textContent = node.name || node.label || formatMAC(mac);\n        elements.otaCurrentVersion.textContent = node.firmware_version || 'Unknown';\n        elements.otaLatestVersion.textContent = state.latestFirmware || 'Unknown';\n        elements.otaInfoCurrent.textContent = node.firmware_version || 'Unknown';\n        elements.otaInfoLatest.textContent = state.latestFirmware || 'Unknown';\n        elements.otaInfoStatus.textContent = getNodeStatus(node);\n        elements.otaInfoStatus.className = 'info-value ' + getNodeStatus(node);\n\n        elements.otaModal.dataset.targetMAC = mac;\n        openModal('ota-modal');\n    }\n\n    function showBulkOTAModal() {\n        const macs = Array.from(state.selectedNodes);\n        const outdated = macs.filter(mac => {\n            const node = state.nodes.find(n => n.mac === mac);\n            return node && isFirmwareOutdated(node);\n        });\n\n        if (outdated.length === 0) {\n            showToast('No selected nodes have outdated firmware', 'warning');\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // Show confirmation\n        if (outdated.length === 1) {\n            showOTAModal(outdated[0]);\n        } else {\n            // For multiple nodes, confirm without showing modal\n            if (confirm(`Update ${outdated.length} nodes to firmware ${state.latestFirmware || 'latest'}?`)) {\n                updateMultipleNodes(outdated);\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    async function confirmOTA() {\n        const mac = elements.otaModal.dataset.targetMAC;\n        if (!mac) return;\n\n        closeModal('ota-modal');\n\n        try {\n            showToast('Starting firmware update...', 'info');\n\n            const response = await fetch(`/api/nodes/${mac}/ota`, {\n                method: 'POST',\n                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }\n            });\n\n            if (!response.ok) {\n                throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}`);\n            }\n\n            showToast(`Firmware update started for ${formatMAC(mac)}`, 'success');\n            fetchFleetData(); // Refresh to show updating status\n\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[FleetPage] OTA failed:', error);\n            showToast('Failed to start firmware update', 'error');\n        }\n    }\n\n    async function updateMultipleNodes(macs) {\n        try {\n            showToast(`Starting updates for ${macs.length} nodes...`, 'info');\n\n            // Update nodes in sequence with 30s stagger\n            for (let i = 0; i < macs.length; i++) {\n                setTimeout(async () => {\n                    try {\n                        await fetch(`/api/nodes/${macs[i]}/ota`, {\n                            method: 'POST',\n                            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }\n                        });\n\n                        if (i === macs.length - 1) {\n                            showToast(`Firmware updates started for ${macs.length} nodes`, 'success');\n                            fetchFleetData();\n                        }\n                    } catch (error) {\n                        console.error(`[FleetPage] OTA failed for ${macs[i]}:`, error);\n                    }\n                }, i * 30000); // 30 second stagger\n            }\n\n            showToast(`Firmware updates queued for ${macs.length} nodes`, 'info');\n\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[FleetPage] Bulk OTA failed:', error);\n            showToast('Failed to start firmware updates', 'error');\n        }\n    }\n\n    async function updateAllFirmware() {\n        if (!confirm('Update all nodes to the latest firmware?\\n\\nThis will update nodes in sequence with a 30-second gap between each node.')) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        try {\n            const response = await fetch('/api/nodes/update-all', {\n                method: 'POST',\n                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }\n            });\n\n            if (!response.ok) {\n                throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}`);\n            }\n\n            const data = await response.json();\n            showToast(`Firmware updates started for ${data.count || 0} nodes`, 'success');\n            fetchFleetData();\n\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[FleetPage] Update all failed:', error);\n            showToast('Failed to start firmware updates', 'error');\n        }\n    }\n\n    async function rebaselineAll() {\n        if (!confirm('Re-baseline all links?\\n\\nThis will reset all link baselines. Make sure the space is empty during the 60-second calibration window.')) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        try {\n            showToast('Starting re-baseline for all links...', 'info');\n\n            const response = await fetch('/api/nodes/rebaseline-all', {\n                method: 'POST',\n                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }\n            });\n\n            if (!response.ok) {\n                throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}`);\n            }\n\n            showToast('Re-baseline started for all links', 'success');\n            fetchFleetData();\n\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[FleetPage] Re-baseline failed:', error);\n            showToast('Failed to start re-baseline', 'error');\n        }\n    }\n\n    async function exportConfig() {\n        try {\n            const response = await fetch('/api/export');\n            if (!response.ok) {\n                throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}`);\n            }\n\n            const data = await response.json();\n            const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(data, null, 2)], { type: 'application/json' });\n            const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);\n            const a = document.createElement('a');\n            a.href = url;\n            a.download = `spaxel-config-${new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10)}.json`;\n            document.body.appendChild(a);\n            a.click();\n            document.body.removeChild(a);\n            URL.revokeObjectURL(url);\n\n            showToast('Configuration exported', 'success');\n\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[FleetPage] Export failed:', error);\n            showToast('Failed to export configuration', 'error');\n        }\n    }\n\n    function showImportModal() {\n        // Reset the import modal state\n        if (elements.importFileInput) {\n            elements.importFileInput.value = '';\n        }\n        if (elements.importInfo) {\n            elements.importInfo.style.display = 'none';\n        }\n        if (elements.importConfirmBtn) {\n            elements.importConfirmBtn.disabled = true;\n        }\n        openModal('import-modal');\n    }\n\n    function showRoleModal() {\n        const count = state.selectedNodes.size;\n        elements.roleNodeCount.textContent = count;\n        openModal('role-modal');\n    }\n\n    async function confirmRoleAssignment() {\n        const selected = document.querySelector('input[name=\"role-assignment\"]:checked');\n        if (!selected) {\n            showToast('Please select a role', 'warning');\n            return;\n        }\n\n        const newRole = selected.value;\n        closeModal('role-modal');\n\n        try {\n            const macs = Array.from(state.selectedNodes);\n            let successCount = 0;\n\n            for (const mac of macs) {\n                try {\n                    const response = await fetch(`/api/nodes/${mac}/role`, {\n                        method: 'POST',\n                        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n                        body: JSON.stringify({ role: newRole })\n                    });\n\n                    if (response.ok) {\n                        successCount++;\n\n                        // Update local state\n                        const nodeIndex = state.nodes.findIndex(n => n.mac === mac);\n                        if (nodeIndex !== -1) {\n                            state.nodes[nodeIndex].role = newRole;\n                        }\n                    }\n                } catch (error) {\n                    console.error(`[FleetPage] Failed to update role for ${mac}:`, error);\n                }\n            }\n\n            if (successCount > 0) {\n                showToast(`Role updated for ${successCount} nodes`, 'success');\n                fetchFleetData();\n            }\n\n            if (successCount < macs.length) {\n                showToast(`Failed to update ${macs.length - successCount} nodes`, 'warning');\n            }\n\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[FleetPage] Role assignment failed:', error);\n            showToast('Failed to assign roles', 'error');\n        }\n    }\n\n    function showRemoveModal() {\n        const macs = Array.from(state.selectedNodes);\n        elements.removeNodeCount.textContent = macs.length;\n\n        // List nodes to be removed\n        const listHTML = '<ul>' + macs.map(mac => {\n            const node = state.nodes.find(n => n.mac === mac);\n            const label = node ? (node.name || node.label || formatMAC(mac)) : formatMAC(mac);\n            return `<li>${escapeHtml(label)} (${escapeHtml(mac)})</li>`;\n        }).join('') + '</ul>';\n\n        elements.removeNodeList.innerHTML = listHTML;\n        openModal('remove-modal');\n    }\n\n    async function confirmRemove() {\n        closeModal('remove-modal');\n\n        if (!confirm('This action cannot be undone. Remove selected nodes from the fleet?')) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        try {\n            const macs = Array.from(state.selectedNodes);\n            let successCount = 0;\n\n            for (const mac of macs) {\n                try {\n                    const response = await fetch(`/api/nodes/${mac}`, {\n                        method: 'DELETE'\n                    });\n\n                    if (response.ok) {\n                        successCount++;\n                        state.selectedNodes.delete(mac);\n                    }\n                } catch (error) {\n                    console.error(`[FleetPage] Failed to remove ${mac}:`, error);\n                }\n            }\n\n            if (successCount > 0) {\n                showToast(`Removed ${successCount} nodes from fleet`, 'success');\n                fetchFleetData();\n            }\n\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[FleetPage] Remove failed:', error);\n            showToast('Failed to remove nodes', 'error');\n        }\n    }\n\n    let importData = null;\n\n    async function handleImportFile(file) {\n        if (!file) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        if (!file.name.endsWith('.json')) {\n            showToast('Please select a JSON file', 'warning');\n            return;\n        }\n\n        try {\n            const text = await file.text();\n            importData = JSON.parse(text);\n\n            // Show import info\n            elements.importFilename.textContent = file.name;\n            elements.importNodesCount.textContent = importData.nodes ? importData.nodes.length : 0;\n            elements.importInfo.style.display = '';\n            elements.importConfirmBtn.disabled = false;\n\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[FleetPage] Failed to parse import file:', error);\n            showToast('Invalid JSON file', 'error');\n            importData = null;\n        }\n    }\n\n    async function confirmImport() {\n        if (!importData) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        closeModal('import-modal');\n\n        try {\n            const response = await fetch('/api/import', {\n                method: 'POST',\n                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n                body: JSON.stringify(importData)\n            });\n\n            if (!response.ok) {\n                throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}`);\n            }\n\n            const result = await response.json();\n            showToast(`Configuration imported: ${result.imported.nodes || 0} nodes`, 'success');\n            fetchFleetData();\n\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[FleetPage] Import failed:', error);\n            showToast('Failed to import configuration', 'error');\n        }\n\n        importData = null;\n    }\n\n    function showMoreActions(button, mac) {\n        const node = state.nodes.find(n => n.mac === mac);\n        if (!node) return;\n\n        // Remove any existing dropdowns\n        closeAllDropdowns();\n\n        // Create dropdown menu\n        const dropdown = document.createElement('div');\n        dropdown.className = 'dropdown-menu visible';\n        dropdown.id = `dropdown-${mac}`;\n\n        const label = node.name || node.label || formatMAC(mac);\n        dropdown.innerHTML = `\n            <button class=\"dropdown-item\" data-action=\"role\" data-mac=\"${mac}\">\n                <span class=\"dropdown-icon\">&#x2699;</span> Re-assign Role\n            </button>\n            <button class=\"dropdown-item\" data-action=\"health-history\" data-mac=\"${mac}\">\n                <span class=\"dropdown-icon\">&#x2693;</span> View Health History\n            </button>\n            <button class=\"dropdown-item\" data-action=\"event-history\" data-mac=\"${mac}\">\n                <span class=\"dropdown-icon\">&#x1f4c5;</span> View Event History\n            </button>\n            <button class=\"dropdown-item dropdown-divider\"></button>\n            <button class=\"dropdown-item dropdown-danger\" data-action=\"remove\" data-mac=\"${mac}\">\n                <span class=\"dropdown-icon\">&#x1f5d1;</span> Remove from Fleet\n            </button>\n        `;\n\n        // Position the dropdown\n        const buttonRect = button.getBoundingClientRect();\n        dropdown.style.position = 'fixed';\n        dropdown.style.top = (buttonRect.bottom + 4) + 'px';\n        dropdown.style.right = (window.innerWidth - buttonRect.right) + 'px';\n\n        document.body.appendChild(dropdown);\n\n        // Bind click handlers\n        dropdown.querySelectorAll('.dropdown-item').forEach(item => {\n            item.addEventListener('click', (e) => {\n                e.stopPropagation();\n                const action = item.dataset.action;\n                const targetMac = item.dataset.mac;\n                closeAllDropdowns();\n                handleMoreAction(action, targetMac);\n            });\n        });\n\n        // Close dropdown when clicking outside\n        setTimeout(() => {\n            document.addEventListener('click', closeDropdownOnClickOutside);\n        }, 10);\n    }\n\n    function closeDropdownOnClickOutside(e) {\n        if (!e.target.closest('.dropdown-menu') && !e.target.closest('.btn-more')) {\n            closeAllDropdowns();\n            document.removeEventListener('click', closeDropdownOnClickOutside);\n        }\n    }\n\n    function closeAllDropdowns() {\n        document.querySelectorAll('.dropdown-menu').forEach(menu => {\n            menu.remove();\n        });\n    }\n\n    async function handleMoreAction(action, mac) {\n        const node = state.nodes.find(n => n.mac === mac);\n        if (!node) return;\n\n        switch (action) {\n            case 'role':\n                // Clear existing selection and select just this node\n                state.selectedNodes.clear();\n                state.selectedNodes.add(mac);\n                updateBulkActions();\n                showRoleModal();\n                break;\n\n            case 'health-history':\n                showToast(`Health history for ${node.name || node.label || formatMAC(mac)} coming soon`, 'info');\n                // TODO: Implement health history view\n                break;\n\n            case 'event-history':\n                    showToast(`Event history for ${node.name || node.label || formatMAC(mac)} coming soon`, 'info');\n                // TODO: Implement event history view\n                break;\n\n            case 'remove':\n                // Clear existing selection and select just this node\n                state.selectedNodes.clear();\n                state.selectedNodes.add(mac);\n                updateBulkActions();\n                showRemoveModal();\n                break;\n        }\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // CSV Export\n    // ============================================\n    function downloadCSV() {\n        const headers = [\n            'MAC',\n            'Label',\n            'Status',\n            'Firmware Version',\n            'Uptime (s)',\n            'Role',\n            'Health Score',\n            'Packet Rate (Hz)',\n            'Temperature (C)',\n            'Last Seen'\n        ];\n\n        const rows = state.filteredNodes.map(node => [\n            node.mac,\n            node.name || node.label || '',\n            getNodeStatus(node),\n            node.firmware_version || '',\n            node.uptime_seconds || 0,\n            node.role,\n            (node.health_score || 0).toFixed(2),\n            node.packet_rate || 0,\n            node.temperature || '',\n            new Date(node.last_seen_ms || 0).toISOString()\n        ]);\n\n        const csvContent = [\n            headers.join(','),\n            ...rows.map(row => row.map(v => `\"${v}\"`).join(','))\n        ].join('\\n');\n\n        const blob = new Blob([csvContent], { type: 'text/csv' });\n        const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);\n        const a = document.createElement('a');\n        a.href = url;\n        a.download = `spaxel-fleet-${new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10)}.csv`;\n        document.body.appendChild(a);\n        a.click();\n        document.body.removeChild(a);\n        URL.revokeObjectURL(url);\n\n        showToast(`Downloaded ${state.filteredNodes.length} nodes to CSV`, 'success');\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Summary Update\n    // ============================================\n    function updateSummary() {\n        const total = state.nodes.length;\n        const online = state.nodes.filter(n => getNodeStatus(n) === 'online').length;\n        const unpaired = state.nodes.filter(n => n.unpaired).length;\n\n        elements.totalSummary.textContent = total;\n        elements.onlineSummary.textContent = online;\n\n        // Unpaired summary\n        if (unpaired > 0) {\n            elements.unpairedSummary.style.display = '';\n            elements.unpairedCount.textContent = unpaired;\n        } else {\n            elements.unpairedSummary.style.display = 'none';\n        }\n\n        // Unpaired banner\n        if (unpaired > 0) {\n            let bannerText = unpaired + ' node' + (unpaired > 1 ? 's' : '') +\n                ' connected without credentials';\n            if (unpaired === 1) {\n                // Single unpaired node: link goes straight to re-provision for that node\n                const unpairedNode = state.nodes.find(function (n) { return n.unpaired; });\n                if (unpairedNode) {\n                    const bannerLink = elements.unpairedBanner.querySelector('.banner-action');\n                    if (bannerLink) {\n                        bannerLink.href = '/live?reprovision=' + encodeURIComponent(unpairedNode.mac);\n                        bannerLink.textContent = 'Re-provision';\n                    }\n                }\n            } else {\n                const bannerLink = elements.unpairedBanner.querySelector('.banner-action');\n                if (bannerLink) {\n                    bannerLink.href = '/live';\n                    bannerLink.textContent = 'Open Setup';\n                }\n                bannerText += ' — use the Pair button on each node below';\n            }\n            if (migrationWindow.active && migrationWindow.remainingSecs !== null) {\n                const hours = Math.floor(migrationWindow.remainingSecs / 3600);\n                const mins = Math.floor((migrationWindow.remainingSecs % 3600) / 60);\n                if (hours > 0) {\n                    bannerText += ' (migration window: ' + hours + 'h ' + mins + 'm remaining)';\n                } else {\n                    bannerText += ' (migration window: ' + mins + 'm remaining)';\n                }\n            } else if (!migrationWindow.active && unpaired > 0) {\n                bannerText += ' (migration window closed — new unpaired connections will be rejected)';\n            }\n            elements.unpairedBannerText.textContent = bannerText;\n            elements.unpairedBanner.style.display = '';\n        } else {\n            elements.unpairedBanner.style.display = 'none';\n        }\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Helper Functions\n    // ============================================\n    function getNodeStatus(node) {\n        // Check if node is unpaired (connected without valid credentials)\n        if (node.unpaired) {\n            return 'unpaired';\n        }\n\n        // Check if node is currently updating\n        if (node.ota_in_progress) {\n            return 'updating';\n        }\n\n        // Check if online (last seen within threshold)\n        if (node.last_seen_ms) {\n            const lastSeen = new Date(node.last_seen_ms);\n            const now = new Date();\n            const diff = now - lastSeen;\n\n            if (diff < CONFIG.staleThresholdMs) {\n                return 'online';\n            }\n        }\n\n        return 'offline';\n    }\n\n    function isFirmwareOutdated(node) {\n        if (!state.latestFirmware || !node.firmware_version) {\n            return false;\n        }\n        return node.firmware_version !== state.latestFirmware;\n    }\n\n    function getHealthClass(score) {\n        if (score >= 0.7) return 'good';\n        if (score >= 0.4) return 'fair';\n        return 'poor';\n    }\n\n    function getPacketRateClass(node) {\n        const rate = node.packet_rate || 0;\n        const configured = node.configured_rate || 20;\n        const ratio = rate / configured;\n\n        if (ratio > 0.9) return 'good';\n        if (ratio > 0.7) return 'fair';\n        return 'poor';\n    }\n\n    function getTemperatureClass(temp) {\n        if (!temp) return '';\n        if (temp > 75) return 'alert';\n        return '';\n    }\n\n    function formatMAC(mac) {\n        const parts = mac.split(':');\n        if (parts.length === 6) {\n            return parts.slice(0, 4).join(':');\n        }\n        return mac;\n    }\n\n    function truncateMAC(mac) {\n        const parts = mac.split(':');\n        if (parts.length === 6) {\n            return parts.slice(0, 3).join(':') + '...';\n        }\n        return mac;\n    }\n\n    function formatRole(role) {\n        const roleMap = {\n            'tx': 'TX',\n            'rx': 'RX',\n            'tx_rx': 'TX-RX',\n            'passive': 'Passive',\n            'idle': 'Idle'\n        };\n        return roleMap[role] || role;\n    }\n\n    function formatUptime(seconds) {\n        if (!seconds) return '--';\n\n        const days = Math.floor(seconds / 86400);\n        const hours = Math.floor((seconds % 86400) / 3600);\n        const minutes = Math.floor((seconds % 3600) / 60);\n\n        if (days > 0) {\n            return `${days}d ${hours}h`;\n        } else if (hours > 0) {\n            return `${hours}h ${minutes}m`;\n        } else {\n            return `${minutes}m`;\n        }\n    }\n\n    function formatPacketRate(node) {\n        const actual = node.packet_rate || 0;\n        const configured = node.configured_rate || 20;\n        return `${actual} / ${configured} Hz`;\n    }\n\n    function formatTemperature(temp) {\n        if (!temp && temp !== 0) return '--';\n        return `${Math.round(temp)}°C`;\n    }\n\n    function capitalize(str) {\n        return str.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + str.slice(1);\n    }\n\n    function escapeHtml(str) {\n        const div = document.createElement('div');\n        div.textContent = str;\n        return div.innerHTML;\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Modal Functions\n    // ============================================\n    function openModal(modalId) {\n        const modal = document.getElementById(modalId);\n        if (modal) {\n            modal.style.display = 'flex';\n        }\n    }\n\n    function closeModal(modalId) {\n        const modal = document.getElementById(modalId);\n        if (modal) {\n            modal.style.display = 'none';\n        }\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Toast Notifications\n    // ============================================\n    function showToast(message, type = 'info') {\n        const toast = document.createElement('div');\n        toast.className = `toast ${type}`;\n\n        const icons = {\n            success: '&#x2714;',\n            error: '&#x2716;',\n            warning: '&#x26A0;',\n            info: '&#x2139;'\n        };\n\n        toast.innerHTML = `\n            <span class=\"toast-icon\">${icons[type] || icons.info}</span>\n            <span class=\"toast-message\">${escapeHtml(message)}</span>\n            <button class=\"toast-dismiss\">&times;</button>\n        `;\n\n        elements.toastContainer.appendChild(toast);\n\n        // Auto-dismiss after 5 seconds\n        setTimeout(() => {\n            toast.style.animation = 'slideIn 0.3s ease reverse';\n            setTimeout(() => {\n                toast.remove();\n            }, 300);\n        }, 5000);\n\n        // Dismiss on click\n        toast.querySelector('.toast-dismiss').addEventListener('click', () => {\n            toast.remove();\n        });\n    }\n\n    // ============================================\n    // Utility Functions\n    // ============================================\n    function debounce(func, wait) {\n        let timeout;\n        return function executedFunction(...args) {\n            const later = () => {\n                clearTimeout(timeout);\n                func(...args);\n            };\n            clearTimeout(timeout);\n *SelfHealManager\n\treg              *Registry\n\tunpairedProvider UnpairedProvider\n}\n\n// NewFleetHandler creates a new fleet REST handler.\nfunc NewFleetHandler(healer *SelfHealManager, registry server).\nfunc (h *FleetHandler) SetUnpairedProvider(p UnpairedProvider) {\n\th.unpairedProvider = p\n}\n\n// RegisterRoutes mounts fleet endpoints on r.\n//\n//\tGET  /api/fleet           — all provisioned nodes with full details\n//\tGET  /api/fleet/health   — current fleet health status\n//\tGET  /api/fleet/history  — recent optimisation history\n//\tPOST /api/fleet/optimise — trigger manual re-optimisation\n//\tGET  /api/fleet/simulate — simulate node removal impact\n//\tPATCH /api/nodes/{mac}/label — update node label\n//\tPOST /api/nodes/{mac}/locate — send identify command\n//\tPOST /api/nodes/{mac}/role — assign new role\n//\tDELETE /api/nodes/{mac} — remove from fleet\nfunc (h *FleetHandler) RegisterRoutes(r chi.Router) {\n\tr.Get(\"/api/fleet\", h.getFleet)\n\tr.Get(\"/api/fleet/health\", h.getFleetHealth)\n\tr.Get(\"/api/fleet/history\", h.getFleetHistory)\n\tr.Post(\"/api/fleet/optimise\", h.triggerOptimise)\n\tr.Get(\"/api/fleet/simulate\", h.simulateNodeRemoval)\n\n\t// Node-specific routes\n\tr.Patch(\"/api/nodes/{mac}/label\", h.setNodeLabel)\n\tr.Post(\"/api/nodes/{mac}/locate\", h.locateNode)\n\tr.Post(\"/api/nodes/{mac}/role\", h.setNodeRole)\n\tr.Delete(\"/api/nodes/{mac}\", h.removeNode)\n}\n\n// fleetHealthResponse is the wire format for /api/fleet/health\ntype fleetHealthResponse struct {\n\tCoverageScore float64          `json:\"coverage_score\"`\n\tMeanGDOP      float64          `json:\"mean_gdop\"`\n\tIsDegraded    bool             `json:\"is_degraded\"`\n\tNodes         []fleetNodeEntry `json:\"nodes\"`\n}\n\ntype fleetNodeEntry struct {\n\tMAC             string  `json:\"mac\"`\n\tName            string  `json:\"name\"`\n\tRole            string  `json:\"role\"`\n\tHealthScore     float64 `json:\"health_score\"`\n\tOnline          bool    `json:\"online\"`\n\tPosX            float64 `json:\"pos_x\"`\n\tPosY            float64 `json:\"pos_y\"`\n\tPosZ            float64 `json:\"pos_z\"`\n\tFirmwareVersion string  `json:\"firmware_version\"`\n\tUptimeSeconds   int64   `json:\"uptime_seconds\"`\n\tLastSeenMs      int64   `json:\"last_seen_ms\"`\n\tUnpaired        bool    `json:\"unpaired,omitempty\"`\n}\n\nfunc (h *FleetHandler) getFleetHealth(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tnodes, err := h.reg.GetAllNodes()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\thttp.Error(w, \"internal error\", http.StatusInternalServerError)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\troles := h.healer.GetCurrentRoles()\n\tonlineSet := make(map[string]struct{})\n\tfor _, mac := range h.healer.GetOnlineNodes() {\n\t\tonlineSet[mac] = struct{}{}\n\t}\n\n\tentries := make([]fleetNodeEntry, 0, len(nodes))\n\tfor _, n := range nodes {\n\t\tif n.Virtual {\n\t\t\tcontinue // Skip virtual nodes\n\t\t}\n\t\trole := n.Role\n\t\tif r, ok := roles[n.MAC]; ok {\n\t\t\trole = r\n\t\t}\n\t\t_, online := onlineSet[n.MAC]\n\n\t\t// Calculate uptime: if online, use time since first seen; otherwise, time since went offline\n\t\tvar uptimeSeconds int64\n\t\tif online {\n\t\t\tuptimeSeconds = int64(time.Since(n.FirstSeenAt).Seconds())\n\t\t} else if !n.WentOfflineAt.IsZero() {\n\t\t\tuptimeSeconds = int64(n.WentOfflineAt.Sub(n.FirstSeenAt).Seconds())\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tentries = append(entries, fleetNodeEntry{\n\t\t\tMAC:            n.MAC,\n\t\t\tName:           n.Name,\n\t\t\tRole:           role,\n\t\t\tHealthScore:    n.HealthScore,\n\t\t\tOnline:         online,\n\t\t\tPosX:           n.PosX,\n\t\t\tPosY:           n.PosY,\n\t\t\tPosZ:           n.PosZ,\n\t\t\tFirmwareVersion: n.FirmwareVersion,\n\t\t\tUptimeSeconds:  uptimeSeconds,\n\t\t\tLastSeenMs:     n.LastSeenAt.UnixMilli(),\n\t\t})\n\t}\n\n\t// Merge in unpaired nodes (connected without a valid token) that aren't in the registry yet.\n\tif h.unpairedProvider != nil {\n\t\tregisteredMACs := make(map[string]struct{}, len(entries))\n\t\tfor _, e := range entries {\n\t\t\tregisteredMACs[e.MAC] = struct{}{}\n\t\t}\n\t\tfor _, mac := range h.unpairedProvider.GetUnpairedMACs() {\n\t\t\tif _, exists := registeredMACs[mac]; exists {\n\t\t\t\t// Already in the registry — mark as unpaired in the existing entry.\n\t\t\t\tfor i := range entries {\n\t\t\t\t\tif entries[i].MAC == mac {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tentries[i].Unpaired = true\n\t\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tentries = append(entries, fleetNodeEntry{\n\t\t\t\t\tMAC:      mac,\n\t\t\t\t\tOnline:   true,\n\t\t\t\t\tUnpaired: true,\n\t\t\t\t\tRole:     \"rx\",\n\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tresp := fleetHealthResponse{\n\t\tCoverageScore: h.healer.GetCoverageScore(),\n\t\tMeanGDOP:      0, // Will be computed if GDOP calculator is available\n\t\tIsDegraded:    len(onlineSet) < 2 && len(entries) >= 2,\n\t\tNodes:         entries,\n\t}\n\n\twriteJSON(w, resp)\n}\n\n// getFleet returns all provisioned nodes with full details.\n// This is the same as /api/fleet/health but without the health metadata,\n// providing a flat list of nodes for the fleet status page.\nfunc (h *FleetHandler) role,\n\t\t\tHealthScore:    n.HealthScore,\n\t\t\tOnline:         online,\n\t\t\tPosX:           n.PosX,\n\t\t\tPosY:           n.PosY,\n\t\t\tPosZ:           n.PosZ,\n\t\t\tFirmwareVersion: *FleetHandler) getFleetHistory(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tlimitStr := r.URL.Query().Get(\"limit\")\n\tlimit := 10\n\tif limitStr != \"\" {\n\t\tif l, err := strconv.Atoi(limitStr); h.updateAllNodes)\n95\t\tr.Post(\"/api/nodes/rebaseline-all\", h.rebaselineAllNodes)\n96\t\tr.Post(\"/api/nodes/virtual\", h.addVirtualNode)\n97\t\tr.Put(\"/api/room\", h.updateRoom)\n98\t\t// System mode endpoints\n99\t\tr.Get(\"/api/mode\", h.getSystemMode)\n100\t\tr.Post(\"/api/mode\", h.setSystemMode)\n101\t\t// Export/Import endpoints\n102\t\tr.Get(\"/api/export\", h.exportConfig)\n103\t\tr.Post(\"/api/import\", h.importConfig)\n104\t}\n105\t\n106\tfunc (h *Handler) listNodes(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n107\t\tnodes, err := h.mgr.registry.GetAllNodes()\n108\t\tif err != nil {\n109\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"internal error\", http.StatusInternalServerError)\n110\t\t\treturn\n111\t\t}\n112\t\tif nodes == nil {\n113\t\t\tnodes = []NodeRecord{}\n114\t\t}\n115\t\twriteJSON(w, nodes)\n116\t}\n117\t\n118\t// FleetNode represents extended node data for the fleet page.\n119\ttype FleetNode struct {\n120\t\tMAC             string  `json:\"mac\"`\n121\t\tName            string  `json:\"name\"`\n122\t\tLabel           string  `json:\"label\"`\n123\t\tRole            string  `json:\"role\"`\n124\t\tStatus          string  `json:\"status\"` // \"online\", \"offline\", \"updating\", \"unpaired\"\n125\t\tFirmwareVersion string  `json:\"firmware_version\"`\n126\t\tChipModel       string  `json:\"chip_model\"`\n127\t\tPosX            float64 `json:\"pos_x\"`\n128\t\tPosY            float64 `json:\"pos_y\"`\n129\t\tPosZ            float64 `json:\"pos_z\"`\n130\t\tVirtual         bool    `json:\"virtual\"`\n131\t\tManufacturer    string  `json:\"manufacturer,omitempty\"`\n132\t\tHealthScore     float64 `json:\"health_score\"`\n133\t\tUnpaired        bool    `json:\"unpaired,omitempty\"`\n134\t\t// Computed fields\n135\t\tLastSeenMS    int64   `json:\"last_seen_ms\"`\n136\t\tUptimeSeconds int64   `json:\"uptime_seconds\"`\n137\t\tPacketRate    float64 `json:\"packet_rate\"`\n138\t\tConfiguredRate int   `json:\"configured_rate\"`\n139\t\tTemperature   float64 `json:\"temperature\"`\n140\t\tOTAInProgress bool    `json:\"ota_in_progress\"`\n141\t}\n142\t\n143\t// fleetListResponse wraps the fleet list with migration window metadata.\n144\ttype fleetListResponse struct {\n145\t\tNodes                   []FleetNode `json:\"nodes\"`\n146\t\tMigrationWindowActive   bool        `json:\"migration_window_active\"`\n147\t\tMigrationDeadlineMS     int64       `json:\"migration_deadline_ms,omitempty\"`\n148\t\tMigrationRemainingSecs  float64     `json:\"migration_remaining_secs,omitempty\"`\n149\t}\n150\t\n151\t// listFleet returns extended node data with computed fields for the fleet page.\n152\tfunc (h *Handler) listFleet(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n153\t\tnodes, err := h.mgr.registry.GetAllNodes()\n154\t\tif err != nil {\n155\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"internal error\", http.StatusInternalServerError)\n156\t\t\treturn\n157\t\t}\n158\t\tif nodes == nil {\n159\t\t\tnodes = []NodeRecord{}\n160\t\t}\n161\t\n162\t\t// Get connected MACs for status determination\n163\t\tvar connectedMACs []string\n164\t\tif h.nodeID != nil {\n165\t\t\tconnectedMACs = h.nodeID.GetConnectedMACs()\n166\t\t}\n167\t\tconnectedSet := make(map[string]bool)\n168\t\tfor _, mac := range connectedMACs {\n169\t\t\tconnectedSet[mac] = true\n170\t\t}\n171\t\n172\t\t// Get unpaired MACs (nodes connected without valid tokens)\n173\t\tunpairedSet := make(map[string]bool)\n174\t\tif h.nodeID != nil {\n175\t\t\tfor _, mac := range h.nodeID.GetUnpairedMACs() {\n176\t\t\t\tunpairedSet[mac] = true\n177\t\t\t}\n178\t\t}\n179\t\n180\t\t// Get OTA progress if OTA manager is available\n181\t\tvar otaProgress map[string]ota.NodeOTAProgress\n182\t\tif h.otaMgr != nil {\n183\t\t\totaProgress = h.otaMgr.GetProgress()\n184\t\t}\n185\t\n186\t\t// Convert to FleetNode with computed fields\n187\t\tfleetNodes := make([]FleetNode, 0, len(nodes))\n188\t\tnow := time.Now()\n189\t\tfor _, node := range nodes {\n190\t\t\tfleetNode := FleetNode{\n191\t\t\t\tMAC:             node.MAC,\n192\t\t\t\tName:            node.Name,\n193\t\t\t\tLabel:           node.Name, // Label is same as name\n194\t\t\t\tRole:            node.Role,\n195\t\t\t\tFirmwareVersion: node.FirmwareVersion,\n196\t\t\t\tChipModel:       node.ChipModel,\n197\t\t\t\tPosX:            node.PosX,\n198\t\t\t\tPosY:            node.PosY,\n199\t\t\t\tPosZ:            node.PosZ,\n200\t\t\t\tVirtual:         node.Virtual,\n201\t\t\t\tManufacturer:    node.Manufacturer,\n202\t\t\t\tHealthScore:     node.HealthScore,\n203\t\t\t\tLastSeenMS:      node.LastSeenAt.UnixMilli(),\n204\t\t\t\tConfiguredRate:  20, // Default configured rate\n205\t\t\t\tTemperature:     0,  // Not currently tracked\n206\t\t\t}\n207\t\n208\t\t\t// Check unpaired status first (highest priority visual indicator)\n209\t\t\tif unpairedSet[node.MAC] {\n210\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Unpaired = true\n211\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"unpaired\"\n212\t\t\t}\n213\t\n214\t\t\t// Determine status - check OTA progress first (skip if already unpaired)\n215\t\t\tif !fleetNode.Unpaired && otaProgress != nil {\n216\t\t\t\tif progress, ok := otaProgress[node.MAC]; ok {\n217\t\t\t\t\t// Node has OTA progress - determine status from OTA state\n218\t\t\t\t\tswitch progress.State {\n219\t\t\t\t\tcase ota.OTAPending, ota.OTADownloading, ota.OTARebooting:\n220\t\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"updating\"\n221\t\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.OTAInProgress = true\n222\t\t\t\t\tcase ota.OTAFailed, ota.OTARollback:\n223\t\t\t\t\t\t// Failed or rollback - show as offline\n224\t\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"offline\"\n225\t\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.OTAInProgress = false\n226\t\t\t\t\tcase ota.OTAVerified:\n227\t\t\t\t\t\t// Verified - check if currently connected\n228\t\t\t\t\t\tif connectedSet[node.MAC] {\n229\t\t\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"online\"\n230\t\t\t\t\t\t} else {\n231\t\t\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"offline\"\n232\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n233\t\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.OTAInProgress = false\n234\t\t\t\t\tdefault:\n235\t\t\t\t\t\t// No active OTA - check connection status\n236\t\t\t\t\t\tif connectedSet[node.MAC] {\n237\t\t\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"online\"\n238\t\t\t\t\t\t} else {\n239\t\t\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"offline\"\n240\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n241\t\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.OTAInProgress = false\n242\t\t\t\t\t}\n243\t\t\t\t} else {\n244\t\t\t\t\t// No OTA progress for this node - check connection status\n245\t\t\t\t\tif connectedSet[node.MAC] {\n246\t\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"online\"\n247\t\t\t\t\t} else if node.WentOfflineAt.IsZero() {\n248\t\t\t\t\t\t// Never seen online or still in initial state\n249\t\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"offline\"\n250\t\t\t\t\t} else {\n251\t\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"offline\"\n252\t\t\t\t\t}\n253\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.OTAInProgress = false\n254\t\t\t\t}\n255\t\t\t} else if !fleetNode.Unpaired {\n256\t\t\t\t// No OTA manager - check connection status\n257\t\t\t\tif connectedSet[node.MAC] {\n258\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"online\"\n259\t\t\t\t} else if node.WentOfflineAt.IsZero() {\n260\t\t\t\t\t// Never seen online or still in initial state\n261\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"offline\"\n262\t\t\t\t} else {\n263\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"offline\"\n264\t\t\t\t}\n265\t\t\t\tfleetNode.OTAInProgress = false\n266\t\t\t}\n267\t\n268\t\t\t// Calculate uptime (time since first seen, approximated as last seen - first seen + current session)\n269\t\t\tif !node.FirstSeenAt.IsZero() && !node.LastSeenAt.IsZero() {\n270\t\t\t\t// Approximate uptime as time since first seen\n271\t\t\t\tfleetNode.UptimeSeconds = int64(now.Sub(node.FirstSeenAt).Seconds())\n272\t\t\t}\n273\t\n274\t\t\t// Packet rate - would need to be calculated from recent CSI data\n275\t\t\t// For now, use a reasonable default or calculate from health score\n276\t\t\tif fleetNode.Status == \"online\" && fleetNode.HealthScore > 0 {\n277\t\t\t\tfleetNode.PacketRate = fleetNode.HealthScore * 20 // Approximate based on health\n278\t\t\t}\n279\t\n280\t\t\tfleetNodes = append(fleetNodes, fleetNode)\n281\t\t}\n282\t\n283\t\t// Append unpaired nodes that are connected but not in the registry.\n284\t\tregisteredMACs := make(map[string]bool, len(fleetNodes))\n285\t\tfor _, n := range fleetNodes {\n286\t\t\tregisteredMACs[n.MAC] = true\n287\t\t}\n288\t\tfor mac := range unpairedSet {\n289\t\t\tif !registeredMACs[mac] {\n290\t\t\t\tfleetNodes = append(fleetNodes, FleetNode{\n291\t\t\t\t\tMAC:        mac,\n292\t\t\t\t\tStatus:     \"unpaired\",\n293\t\t\t\t\tUnpaired:   true,\n294\t\t\t\t\tRole:       \"rx\",\n295\t\t\t\t\tLastSeenMS: now.UnixMilli(),\n296\t\t\t\t})\n297\t\t\t}\n298\t\t}\n299\t\n300\t\t// Build response with migration window metadata.\n301\t\tresp := fleetListResponse{\n302\t\t\tNodes: fleetNodes,\n303\t\t}\n304\t\tif h.migProvider != nil {\n305\t\t\tdeadline := h.migProvider.GetMigrationDeadline()\n306\t\t\tif !deadline.IsZero() {\n307\t\t\t\tresp.MigrationDeadlineMS = deadline.UnixMilli()\n308\t\t\t\tremaining := time.Until(deadline).Seconds()\n309\t\t\t\tif remaining > 0 {\n310\t\t\t\t\tresp.MigrationWindowActive = true\n311\t\t\t\t\tresp.MigrationRemainingSecs = remaining\n312\t\t\t\t}\n313\t\t\t}\n314\t\t}\n315\t\n316\t\twriteJSON(w, resp)\n317\t}\n318\t\n319\tfunc (h *Handler) getNode(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n320\t\tmac := chi.URLParam(r, \"mac\")\n321\t\tnode, err := h.mgr.registry.GetNode(mac)\n322\t\tif errors.Is(err, sql.ErrNoRows) {\n323\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"node not found\", http.StatusNotFound)\n324\t\t\treturn\n325\t\t}\n326\t\tif err != nil {\n327\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"internal error\", http.StatusInternalServerError)\n328\t\t\treturn\n329\t\t}\n330\t\twriteJSON(w, node)\n331\t}\n332\t\n333\tvar validRoles = map[string]bool{\n334\t\t\"tx\": true, \"rx\": true, \"tx_rx\": true, \"passive\": true, \"virtual\": true, \"idle\": true,\n335\t}\n336\t\n337\ttype setRoleRequest struct {\n338\t\tRole string `json:\"role\"`\n339\t}\n340\t\n341\tfunc (h *Handler) setNodeRole(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n342\t\tmac := chi.URLParam(r, {\n432\t\tDurationMS int `json:\"duration_ms\"`\n433\t}\n434\t\n435\tfunc (h *Handler) identifyNode(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n436\t\tmac := chi.URLParam(r, \"mac\")\n437\t\n438\t\t// (h *Handler) rebootNode(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n472\t\tmac := chi.URLParam(r, \"mac\")\n473\t\n474\t\t// Verify node exists.\n475\t\tif _, err := h.mgr.registry.GetNode(mac); http.StatusInternalServerError)\n480\t\t\treturn\n481\t\t}\n482\t\n483\t\t// Parse request body for optional delay.\n484\t\tvar req struct {\n485\t\t\tDelayMS int `json:\"delay_ms\"`\n486\t\t}\n487\t\tif err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil && err.Error() != \"EOF\" {\n488\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"invalid request body\", http.StatusBadRequest)\n489\t\t\treturn\n490\t\t}\n491\t\n492\t\tdelayMS := req.DelayMS\n493\t\tif delayMS <= 0 {\n494\t\t\tdelayMS = 1000 // Default 1 second delay\n495\t\t}\n496\t\n497\t\t// Send *http.Request) {\n509\t\t// Trigger rolling update with 30-second stagger (if OTA manager is configured)\n510\t\tif h.otaMgr != nil {\n511\t\t\tgo func() {\n512\t\t\t\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 30*time.Minute)\n513\t\t\t\tdefer cancel()\n514\t\n515\t\t\t\tif err := h.otaMgr.SendOTAAll(ctx, 30*time.Second); err != nil {\n516\t\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[ERROR] fleet: updateAllNodes failed: %v\", err)\n517\t\t\t\t}\n518\t\t\t}()\n519\t\t}\n520\t\n521\t\t// Return immediately with the count of nodes that will be updated\n522\t\tvar count int\n523\t\tif h.nodeID != nil {\n524\t\t\tmacs := h.nodeID.GetConnectedMACs()\n525\t\t\tcount = len(macs)\n526\t\t}\n527\t\n528\t\twriteJSON(w, map[string]interface{}{\n529\t\t\t\"ok\":    true,\n530\t\t\t\"count\": count,\n531\t\t})\n532\t}\n533\t\n534\tfunc (h *Handler) rebaselineAllNodes(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n535\t\t// This is a placeholder - the actual baseline manager would handle this\n536\t\t// For now, return a success response\n537\t\twriteJSON(w, map[string]interface{}{\n538\t\t\t\"ok\":    true,\n539\t\t\t\"count\": 0,\n540\t\t})\n541\t}\n542\t\n543\tfunc (h *Handler) exportConfig(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n544\t\t// Collect all configuration data\n545\t\tnodes, err := nodes,\n555\t\t}\n556\t\n557\t\tw.Header().Set(\"Content-Type\", \"application/json\")\n558\t\tif err := json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(config); err != nil {\n559\t\t\thttp.Error(w, \"failed to encode restoration.\n765\tfunc (h *Handler) disableNode(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n766\t\tmac := chi.URLParam(r, \"mac\")\n767\t\n768\t\t// Verify node exists and get its current http.StatusInternalServerError)\n821\t\t\treturn\n822\t\t}\n823\t\n824\t\t// If no saved role, use a sensible default based on current state.\n825\t\tif priorRole == \"\" {\n826\t\t\tif node.Role == \"idle\" {\n827\t\t\t\t// Node was disabled before we started saving prior_role.\n828\t\t\t\t// Default to \"rx\" as a safe fallback.\n829\t\t\t\tpriorRole = \"rx\"\n830\t\t\t} else {\n831\t\t\t\t// priorRole,\n857\t\t})\n858\t}\n859\t"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"bbd0fe2e-0d52-4d62-bbcf-eed5b7985f9e","uuid":"186f6406-38f9-4813-bc0b-444adbc264f5","timestamp":"2026-05-06T11:44:39.470Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/home/coding/spaxel/mothership/internal/fleet/handler.go","content":"package interface {\n\tGetMigrationDeadline() time.Time\n}\n\n// Handler serves the fleet REST API.\ntype Handler struct {\n\tmgr         *Manager\n\tnodeID      NodeIdentifier\n\totaMgr      *ota.Manager\n\tmigProvider MigrationDeadlineProvider\n}\n\n// NewHandler creates a new fleet REST handler backed by mgr.\nfunc NewHandler(mgr *Manager) *Handler {\n\treturn &Handler{mgr: mgr}\n}\n\n// SetOTAManager sets the OTA manager for handling firmware updates.\nfunc (h *Handler) SetOTAManager(mgr *ota.Manager) {\n\th.otaMgr = mgr\n}\n\n// SetNodeIdentifier sets the node deadline.\nfunc (h *Handler) SetMigrationDeadlineProvider(p MigrationDeadlineProvider) {\n\th.migProvider = p\n}\n\n// RegisterRoutes mounts fleet endpoints on r.\n//\n//\tGET    /api/nodes                — list all nodes\n//\tGET    /api/nodes/{mac}          — get single node\n//\tPOST   /api/nodes/{mac}/role     — override node role\n//\tPUT    /api/nodes/{mac}/position — update node 3D  /api/nodes/{mac}/reboot   — reboot node\n//\tPOST   /api/nodes/{mac}/ota      — trigger OTA update\n//\tPOST   /api/nodes/{mac}/disable  — disable node (set role to IDLE)\n//\tPOST   /api/nodes/{mac}/enable   — enable node (restore prior role)\n//\tPOST   /api/nodes/update-all     — OTA update all nodes\n//\tPOST   /api/nodes/rebaseline-all — re-baseline all links\n//\tPOST   /api/nodes/virtual        — add a virtual planning node\n//\tPUT    /api/room                 — update room dimensions\n//\tGET    /api/export               — export configuration\n//\tPOST   /api/import               — import configuration\n//\tGET    /api/mode                 — get system mode\n//\tPOST   /api/mode                 — set system mode\nfunc (h *Handler) RegisterRoutes(r chi.Router) {\n\tr.Get(\"/api/fleet\", h.listFleet) // Extended fleet data with computed fields\n\tr.Get(\"/api/nodes\", h.listNodes)\n\tr.Get(\"/api/nodes/{mac}\", h.getNode)\n\tr.Post(\"/api/nodes/{mac}/role\", h.setNodeRole)\n\tr.Put(\"/api/nodes/{mac}/position\", h.updateNodePosition)\n\tr.Patch(\"/api/nodes/{mac}/label\", h.updateNodeLabel)\n\tr.Delete(\"/api/nodes/{mac}\", h.deleteNode)\n\tr.Post(\"/api/nodes/{mac}/identify\", h.identifyNode)\n\tr.Post(\"/api/nodes/{mac}/locate\", h.identifyNode) // alias for identify\n\tr.Post(\"/api/nodes/{mac}/reboot\", h.rebootNode)\n\tr.Post(\"/api/nodes/{mac}/ota\", h.triggerNodeOTA)\n\tr.Post(\"/api/nodes/{mac}/disable\", listNodes(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tnodes, err := h.mgr.registry.GetAllNodes()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\thttp.Error(w, \"internal error\", http.StatusInternalServerError)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\tif nodes == nil {\n\t\tnodes = []NodeRecord{}\n\t}\n\twriteJSON(w, nodes)\n}\n\n// FleetNode represents extended node data for the fleet page.\ntype FleetNode struct {\n\tMAC             string  `json:\"mac\"`\n\tName            string  `json:\"name\"`\n\tLabel           string  `json:\"label\"`\n\tRole            string  `json:\"role\"`\n\tStatus          string  `json:\"status\"` // \"online\", \"offline\", \"updating\", \"unpaired\"\n\tFirmwareVersion string  `json:\"firmware_version\"`\n\tChipModel       string  `json:\"chip_model\"`\n\tPosX            float64 `json:\"pos_x\"`\n\tPosY            float64 `json:\"pos_y\"`\n\tPosZ            float64 `json:\"pos_z\"`\n\tVirtual         bool    `json:\"virtual\"`\n\tManufacturer    string  `json:\"manufacturer,omitempty\"`\n\tHealthScore     float64 `json:\"health_score\"`\n\tUnpaired        bool    `json:\"unpaired,omitempty\"`\n\t// Computed fields\n\tLastSeenMS    int64   `json:\"last_seen_ms\"`\n\tUptimeSeconds int64   `json:\"uptime_seconds\"`\n\tPacketRate    float64 `json:\"packet_rate\"`\n\tConfiguredRate int   `json:\"configured_rate\"`\n\tTemperature   float64 `json:\"temperature\"`\n\tOTAInProgress bool    `json:\"ota_in_progress\"`\n}\n\n// fleetListResponse wraps the fleet list with migration window metadata.\ntype fleetListResponse struct {\n\tNodes                   []FleetNode `json:\"nodes\"`\n\tMigrationWindowActive   bool        `json:\"migration_window_active\"`\n\tMigrationDeadlineMS     int64       `json:\"migration_deadline_ms,omitempty\"`\n\tMigrationRemainingSecs  float64     `json:\"migration_remaining_secs,omitempty\"`\n}\n\n// listFleet returns extended node data with computed fields for the fleet page.\nfunc (h *Handler) listFleet(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\n\tnodes, err := h.mgr.registry.GetAllNodes()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\thttp.Error(w, \"internal error\", http.StatusInternalServerError)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\tif nodes == nil {\n\t\tnodes = []NodeRecord{}\n\t}\n\n\t// Get connected MACs for status determination\n\tvar connectedMACs []string\n\tif h.nodeID != nil {\n\t\tconnectedMACs = h.nodeID.GetConnectedMACs()\n\t}\n\tconnectedSet := make(map[string]bool)\n\tfor _, mac := range connectedMACs {\n\t\tconnectedSet[mac] = true\n\t}\n\n\t// Get unpaired MACs (nodes connected without valid tokens)\n\tunpairedSet := make(map[string]bool)\n\tif h.nodeID != nil {\n\t\tfor _, mac := range h.nodeID.GetUnpairedMACs() {\n\t\t\tunpairedSet[mac] = true\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Get OTA progress if OTA manager is available\n\tvar otaProgress map[string]ota.NodeOTAProgress\n\tif h.otaMgr != nil {\n\t\totaProgress = h.otaMgr.GetProgress()\n\t}\n\n\t// Convert to FleetNode with computed fields\n\tfleetNodes := make([]FleetNode, 0, len(nodes))\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tfor _, node := range nodes {\n\t\tfleetNode := FleetNode{\n\t\t\tMAC:             node.MAC,\n\t\t\tName:            node.Name,\n\t\t\tLabel:           node.Name, // Label is same as name\n\t\t\tRole:            node.Role,\n\t\t\tFirmwareVersion: node.FirmwareVersion,\n\t\t\tChipModel:       node.ChipModel,\n\t\t\tPosX:            node.PosX,\n\t\t\tPosY:            node.PosY,\n\t\t\tPosZ:            node.PosZ,\n\t\t\tVirtual:         node.Virtual,\n\t\t\tManufacturer:    node.Manufacturer,\n\t\t\tHealthScore:     node.HealthScore,\n\t\t\tLastSeenMS:      node.LastSeenAt.UnixMilli(),\n\t\t\tConfiguredRate:  20, // Default configured rate\n\t\t\tTemperature:     0,  // Not currently tracked\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Check unpaired status first (highest priority visual indicator)\n\t\tif unpairedSet[node.MAC] {\n\t\t\tfleetNode.Unpaired = true\n\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"unpaired\"\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Determine status - check OTA progress first (skip if already unpaired)\n\t\tif !fleetNode.Unpaired && otaProgress != nil {\n\t\t\tif progress, ok := otaProgress[node.MAC]; ok {\n\t\t\t\t// Node has OTA progress - determine status from OTA state\n\t\t\t\tswitch progress.State {\n\t\t\t\tcase ota.OTAPending, ota.OTADownloading, ota.OTARebooting:\n\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"updating\"\n\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.OTAInProgress = true\n\t\t\t\tcase ota.OTAFailed, ota.OTARollback:\n\t\t\t\t\t// Failed or rollback - show as offline\n\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"offline\"\n\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.OTAInProgress = false\n\t\t\t\tcase ota.OTAVerified:\n\t\t\t\t\t// Verified - check if currently connected\n\t\t\t\t\tif connectedSet[node.MAC] {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"online\"\n\t\t\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"offline\"\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.OTAInProgress = false\n\t\t\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\t\t\t// No active OTA - check connection status\n\t\t\t\t\tif connectedSet[node.MAC] {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"online\"\n\t\t\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"offline\"\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.OTAInProgress = false\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\t// No OTA progress for this node - check connection status\n\t\t\t\tif connectedSet[node.MAC] {\n\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"online\"\n\t\t\t\t} else if node.WentOfflineAt.IsZero() {\n\t\t\t\t\t// Never seen online or still in initial state\n\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"offline\"\n\t\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"offline\"\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tfleetNode.OTAInProgress = false\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else if !fleetNode.Unpaired {\n\t\t\t// No OTA manager - check connection status\n\t\t\tif connectedSet[node.MAC] {\n\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"online\"\n\t\t\t} else if node.WentOfflineAt.IsZero() {\n\t\t\t\t// Never seen online or still in initial state\n\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"offline\"\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tfleetNode.Status = \"offline\"\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tfleetNode.OTAInProgress = false\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Calculate uptime (time since first seen, approximated as last seen - first seen + current session)\n\t\tif !node.FirstSeenAt.IsZero() && !node.LastSeenAt.IsZero() {\n\t\t\t// Approximate uptime as time since first seen\n\t\t\tfleetNode.UptimeSeconds = int64(now.Sub(node.FirstSeenAt).Seconds())\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Packet rate - would need to be calculated from recent CSI data\n\t\t// For now, use a reasonable default or calculate from health score\n\t\tif fleetNode.Status == \"online\" && fleetNode.HealthScore > 0 {\n\t\t\tfleetNode.PacketRate = fleetNode.HealthScore * 20 // Approximate based on health\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tfleetNodes = append(fleetNodes, fleetNode)\n\t}\n\n\t// Append unpaired nodes that are connected but not in the registry.\n\tregisteredMACs := make(map[string]bool, len(fleetNodes))\n\tfor _, n := range fleetNodes {\n\t\tregisteredMACs[n.MAC] = true\n\t}\n\tfor mac := range unpairedSet {\n\t\tif !registeredMACs[mac] {\n\t\t\tfleetNodes = append(fleetNodes, FleetNode{\n\t\t\t\tMAC:        mac,\n\t\t\t\tStatus:     \"unpaired\",\n\t\t\t\tUnpaired:   true,\n\t\t\t\tRole:       \"rx\",\n\t\t\t\tLastSeenMS: now.UnixMilli(),\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Build response with migration window metadata.\n\tresp := fleetListResponse{\n\t\tNodes: fleetNodes,\n\t}\n\tif h.migProvider != nil {\n\t\tdeadline := h.migProvider.GetMigrationDeadline()\n\t\tif !deadline.IsZero() {\n\t\t\tresp.MigrationDeadlineMS = Complex CSI computation: int8 I/Q → float64 complex → amplitude/phase\n43\t  - RSSI normalization (AGC compensation): `norm = 10^((rssi_ref - rssi)/20)`\n44\t  - Spatial phase unwrapping: correct 2π jumps between adjacent subcarriers\n45\t  - Linear regression (OLS): fit `phase = a*k + b` over data subcarriers\n46\t  - STO/CFO removal: residual phase = unwrapped - (slope × k + intercept)\n47\t  - HT20 subcarrier map: 64 total, 46 data (excluding null, guard, pilot)\n48\t\n49\t- **Baseline system (`signal/baseline.go`):**\n50\t  - EMA baseline per link per subcarrier: `baseline = α×amplitude + (1-α)×baseline`\n51\t  - α = dt / (τ + dt) ≈ 0.0033 for dt=0.1s, τ=30s\n52\t  - Motion-gated updates: only update when smoothDeltaRMS < 0.05\n53\t  - Confidence scoring: 0.3 for stale baselines (>7 days), asymptotically → 1.0\n54\t  - Snapshot/restore for SQLite persistence\n55\t  - BaselineManager for multi-link coordination\n56\t\n57\t- **Motion detection (`signal/features.go`):**\n58\t  - NBVI (Normalized Bandwidth Variance Index): `Var(amp) / Mean(amp)²`\n59\t  - Welford's online algorithm for numerically stable variance\n60\t  - Top-16 subcarrier selection by NBVI score\n61\t  - deltaRMS: `sqrt(mean((amp - baseline)²))` over selected subcarriers\n62\t  - Exponential smoothing: `smooth = 0.3×raw + 0.7×prev`\n63\t  - Motion threshold: smoothDeltaRMS > 0.02\n64\t\n65\t- **Link processor (`signal/processor.go`):**\n66\t  - LinkProcessor: ties together phase sanitization, baseline, motion detection\n67\t  - ProcessorManager: manages per-link processors with thread-safe access\n68\t  - GetAllMotionStates(): returns motion state for all links\n69\t  - GetAllBaselines()/RestoreBaseline(): for SQLite persistence\n70\t\n71\t**Constants used (from plan):**\n72\t- RSSIRefdBm = -30.0\n73\t- DefaultMotionThreshold = 0.05\n74\t- DefaultDeltaRMSThreshold = 0.02\n75\t- NBVITopCount = 16\n76\t- NBVIMinThreshold = 0.001\n77\t- DeltaRMSSmoothingAlpha = 0.3\n78\t\n79\t**Tests:** 37 tests covering phase sanitization, baseline, NBVI, motion detection. BOOT → WIFI_CONNECTING → MOTHERSHIP_DISCOVERY → CONNECTED\n232\t  - Degraded states: WIFI_LOST, MOTHERSHIP_UNAVAILABLE, CAPTIVE_PORTAL\n233\t  - Exponential backoff on WiFi failures (1s → 30s max)\n234\t  - OTA download task with progress reporting and automatic reboot\n248\t\n249\t- **CSI capture (csi.c/h):**\n250\t  - WiFi promiscuous mode with CSI callback\n251\t  - Queue-based processing (32-frame buffer)\n252\t  - Spaxel Implementation Progress\n\n## Phase 1 — Foundation\n\nGoal: Bare-minimum loop from ESP32 to browser. Zero-config with passive radar and mDNS from day one.\n\n### Status: COMPLETE\n\n| Item | Status | Notes |\n|------|--------|-------|\n| ESP32 firmware skeleton | **Done** | See iteration 2 below |\n| Passive radar support | **Done** | BSSID filter in csi.c |\n| BLE scanning | **Done** | Core 0 concurrent with WiFi |\n| Mothership WebSocket ingestion | **Done** | See iteration 1 below |\n| Dashboard skeleton | **Done** | See iteration 3 below |\n| Docker packaging | **Done** | See iteration 4 below |\n\n## Phase 2 — Signal Processing & Detection\n\nGoal: Detect presence on a single link.\n\n### Status\n\n| Item | Status | Notes |\n|------|--------|-------|\n| Phase sanitisation | **Done** | See iteration 5 below |\n| Baseline system | **Done** | EMA with motion-gated updates |\n| Motion detection | **Done** | deltaRMS, NBVI selection |\n| Dashboard presence indicator | **Pending** | |\n| CSI recording buffer | **Pending** | |\n| Adaptive sensing rate | **Pending** | |\n\n### Iteration Log\n\n#### Iteration 5 — 2026-03-26\n\n**Completed:** Signal processing package (phase sanitisation, baseline, motion detection)\n\nImplemented the core signal processing pipeline in Go with:\n\n- **Phase sanitization (`signal/phase.go`):**\n  - Complex CSI computation: int8 I/Q → float64 complex → amplitude/phase\n  - RSSI normalization (AGC compensation): `norm = 10^((rssi_ref - rssi)/20)`\n  - Spatial phase unwrapping: correct 2π jumps between adjacent subcarriers\n  - Linear regression (OLS): fit `phase = a*k + b` over data subcarriers\n  - STO/CFO removal: residual phase = unwrapped - (slope × k + intercept)\n  - HT20 subcarrier map: 64 total, 46 data (excluding null, guard, pilot)\n\n- **Baseline system (`signal/baseline.go`):**\n  - EMA baseline per link per subcarrier: `baseline = α×amplitude + (1-α)×baseline`\n  - α = dt / (τ + dt) ≈ 0.0033 for dt=0.1s, τ=30s\n  - Motion-gated updates: only update when smoothDeltaRMS < 0.05\n  - Confidence scoring: 0.3 for stale baselines (>7 days), asymptotically → 1.0\n  - Snapshot/restore for SQLite persistence\n  - BaselineManager for multi-link coordination\n\n- **Motion detection (`signal/features.go`):**\n  - NBVI (Normalized Bandwidth Variance Index): `Var(amp) / Mean(amp)²`\n  - Welford's online algorithm for numerically stable variance\n  - Top-16 subcarrier selection by NBVI score\n  - deltaRMS: `sqrt(mean((amp - baseline)²))` over selected subcarriers\n  - Exponential smoothing: `smooth = 0.3×raw + 0.7×prev`\n  - Motion threshold: smoothDeltaRMS > 0.02\n\n- **Link processor (`signal/processor.go`):**\n  - LinkProcessor: ties together phase sanitization, baseline, motion detection\n  - ProcessorManager: manages per-link processors with thread-safe access\n  - GetAllMotionStates(): returns motion state for all links\n  - GetAllBaselines()/RestoreBaseline(): for SQLite persistence\n\n**Constants used (from plan):**\n- RSSIRefdBm = -30.0\n- DefaultMotionThreshold = 0.05\n- DefaultDeltaRMSThreshold = 0.02\n- NBVITopCount = 16\n- NBVIMinThreshold = 0.001\n- DeltaRMSSmoothingAlpha = 0.3\n\n**Tests:** 37 tests covering phase sanitization, baseline, NBVI, motion detection. All pass.\n\n**Files created:**\n```\nmothership/internal/signal/\n├── phase.go          — Phase sanitization algorithms\n├── phase_test.go     — 15 tests for phase processing\n├── baseline.go       — EMA baseline management\n├── baseline_test.go  — 9 tests for baseline\n├── features.go       — NBVI selection, deltaRMS, motion detection\n├── features_test.go  — 13 tests for features\n└── processor.go      — LinkProcessor, ProcessorManager\n```\n\n**Remaining for Phase 2:**\n- Dashboard presence indicator\n- CSI recording buffer\n- Adaptive sensing rate\n\n#### Iteration 4 — 2026-03-26\n\n**Completed:** Docker packaging\n\nImplemented container deployment with:\n\n- **Dockerfile:** Multi-stage build for minimal production image\n  - Stage 1: `golang:1.23-bookworm` builder with module caching\n  - Stage 2: `distroless/static-debian12:nonroot` runtime (no shell, runs as UID 65532)\n  - CGO_ENABLED=0 build (pure-Go SQLite compatible)\n  - Dashboard static files copied to `/dashboard/`\n  - Firmware directory as volume mount point (`/firmware/`)\n  - Built-in healthcheck via wget\n\n- **docker-compose.yml:** Production-ready orchestration\n  - `network_mode: host` for mDNS multicast discovery (required for ESP32 nodes)\n  - Volume mounts: `spaxel-data` for persistence, `./firmware` for OTA binaries\n  - Environment variables: TZ, mDNS config, optional MQTT\n  - Resource limits: 512m RAM, 2 CPUs (scalable to 1g for 16+ nodes)\n  - 35s stop_grace_period for graceful shutdown\n  - Ulimits: 4096/8192 file descriptors for node connections\n  - Traefik labels (disabled by default, enable for TLS/proxy)\n\n- **Supporting files:**\n  - `VERSION` — 0.1.0 for image tagging\n  - `.dockerignore` — Excludes docs, build artifacts, IDE files\n\n**Key design decisions:**\n- Host networking is REQUIRED for mDNS — Docker bridge blocks multicast 224.0.0.251\n- distroless image minimizes attack surface (no shell, no package manager)\n- Firmware binaries not bundled — users mount their own `/firmware` volume\n- Traefik labels included but disabled — enable for production TLS\n\n**Files created:**\n```\nDockerfile\ndocker-compose.yml\nVERSION\n.dockerignore\n```\n\n**Phase 1 Status:** COMPLETE\n\nAll Phase 1 items implemented:\n- ✅ ESP32 firmware skeleton\n- ✅ Passive radar support\n- ✅ BLE scanning\n- ✅ Mothership WebSocket ingestion\n- ✅ Dashboard skeleton\n- ✅ Docker packaging\n\n**Next:** Phase 2 — Signal Processing (baseline, deltaRMS, Fresnel zones)\n\n#### Iteration 3 — 2026-03-26\n\n**Completed:** Dashboard skeleton with 3D visualization\n\nImplemented the web dashboard in vanilla JS + Three.js with:\n\n- **Static file structure:** `dashboard/` directory with HTML/JS\n  - Top-level `CMakeLists.txt`, `sdkconfig.defaults`, `partitions.csv` (factory + OTA slots)\n  - `main/` component with 5 source modules\n\n- **State machine (main.c):** 7-state node lifecycle\n  - BOOT → WIFI_CONNECTING → MOTHERSHIP_DISCOVERY → CONNECTED\n  - Degraded states: WIFI_LOST, MOTHERSHIP_UNAVAILABLE, CAPTIVE_PORTAL\n  - Exponential backoff on WiFi failures (1s → 30s max)\n  - 10-failure threshold before captive portal\n\n- **WiFi module (wifi.c/h):**\n  - STA connection with exponential backoff\n  - mDNS discovery for `_spaxel._tcp.local` with fallback to cached IP\n  - Captive portal AP mode (`spaxel-XXXX`) with HTTP config page\n  - Event-driven connection state via FreeRTOS event group\n\n- **WebSocket client (websocket.c/h):**\n  - Bidirectional communication on single connection\n  - Binary CSI frame transmission (24-byte header + I/Q payload)\n  - JSON message handling: hello, health, ble, ota_status upstream\n  - Downstream command parsing: role, config, ota, reboot, identify, reject\n  - OTA download task with progress reporting and automatic reboot\n\n- **CSI capture (csi.c/h):**\n  - WiFi promiscuous mode with CSI callback\n  - Queue-based processing (32-frame buffer)\n  - Passive mode BSSID filtering for radar\n  - On-device amplitude variance tracking for motion hints (Welford's algorithm)\n  - TX task for active probing\n\n- **BLE scanner (ble.c/h):**\n  - Passive BLE scanning on Core 0 (concurrent with WiFi)\n  - Device cache (60 entries) with name and manufacturer data parsing\n  - 5-second reporting interval via WebSocket\n  - GAP event handling for advertisement processing\n\n- **NVS persistence:** Full schema with 15 keys\n  - WiFi credentials, node ID/token, mothership config\n  - Role/rate persistence for degraded mode operation\n  - Schema versioning for migration support\n\n**Files created:**\n```\nfirmware/\n├── CMakeLists.txt\n├── sdkconfig.defaults\n├── partitions.csv\n└── main/\n    ├── CMakeLists.txt\n    ├── spaxel.h\n    ├── main.c\n    ├── wifi.h / wifi.c\n    ├── websocket.h / websocket.c\n    ├── csi.h / csi.c\n    └── ble.h / ble.c\n```\n\n**Phase 1 Status:** COMPLETE\n\nAll Phase 1 items implemented:\n- ✅ ESP32 firmware skeleton\n- ✅ Passive radar support\n- ✅ BLE scanning\n- ✅ Mothership WebSocket ingestion\n- ✅ Dashboard skeleton\n- ✅ Docker packaging\n\n**Next:** Phase 2 — Signal Processing (baseline, deltaRMS, Fresnel zones)\n\n#### Iteration 1 — 2026-03-26\n\n**Completed:** Mothership WebSocket ingestion server\n\nImplemented the core ingestion server in Go with:\n\n- **Module structure:** `mothership/` with `cmd/mothership/` entrypoint and `internal/ingestion/` package\n- **WebSocket endpoint:** `/ws/node` accepts bidirectional connections from ESP32 nodes\n- **Binary frame parsing:** 24-byte header + variable payload, per spec in plan.md\n  - Validation: min/max length, payload size match, channel validity (1-14), subcarrier limit (128)\n  - Malformed frame tracking with warn/close thresholds (100/1000 per minute)\n- **JSON message handling:** Parses hello, health, ble, motion_hint, ota_status\n- **Per-link ring buffers:** 256-sample circular buffers keyed by `nodeMAC:peerMAC`\n- **Connection lifecycle:** Node registration via hello, ping/pong keepalive (30s/60s), graceful shutdown\n- **mDNS advertisement:** `_spaxel._tcp.local` via github.com/hashicorp/mdns\n- **Role/config push:** Sends initial `rx` role and 20 Hz config on connect\n- **Health endpoint:** `GET /healthz` returns `{\"status\":\"ok\",\"version\":\"...\"}`\n\n**Dependencies used:**\n- `github.com/go-chi/chi` — HTTP routing\n- `github.com/gorilla/websocket` — WebSocket server\n- `github.com/hashicorp/mdns` — mDNS advertisement\n\n**Tests:** 22 tests covering frame parsing, JSON messages, and ring buffer operations. |\n\n### Iteration 6 — 2026-04-09\n\n**Completed:** Presence prediction for Home Assistant integration\n\nImplemented the full presence prediction system with:\n\n- **Per-person transition probability tracking (`prediction/model.go`):**\n  - `zone_transitions_history` table with all zone transitions (person_id, from_zone, to_zone, hour_of_week, dwell_duration)\n  - `transition_probabilities` table with Laplace-smoothed probabilities\n  - `dwell_times` table with mean/stddev dwell time per person/zone/hour\n  - `person_zone_entry` table for tracking current person positions\n  - Zone transition recording via `PersonZoneChange()` method\n  - Automatic probability recomputation with Laplace smoothing\n  - Dwell time statistics with mean/stddev computation\n\n- **Per-zone occupancy patterns (`prediction/accuracy.go`):**\n  - `zone_occupancy_patterns` table with occupancy_prob per zone/hour_of_week\n  - `zone_occupancy_history` table tracking entries/exits with timestamps\n  - `recorded_predictions` table for tracking prediction accuracy\n  - `accuracy_stats` table with rolling 7-day accuracy metrics\n  - Zone occupancy pattern computation from historical data\n  - Pattern-based occupancy prediction at target time\n\n- **Time-slot based predictions (`prediction/horizon.go`):**\n  - Monte Carlo simulation with 1000 runs for probabilistic predictions\n  - Multi-step path simulation accounting for dwell times\n  - Normal distribution sampling for dwell time variability\n  - Horizon predictions at 5, 15, and 30 minutes\n  - Returns probability distribution over all zones\n  - Confidence scoring based on simulation agreement\n\n- **HA sensor exposure (`mqtt/client.go`):**\n  - `PublishPredictionSensors()` creates HA auto-discovery configs\n  - `UpdatePredictionState()` publishes current predictions to MQTT\n  - Three sensors per person:\n    - `sensor.spaxel_<person>_predicted_zone` - zone name\n    - `sensor.spaxel_<person>_prediction_confidence` - percentage\n    - `sensor.spaxel_<person>_transition_minutes` - estimated minutes\n  - Topics follow HA discovery pattern: `homeassistant/sensor/.../config`\n\n- **REST API endpoints (`api/prediction.go`):**\n  - `GET /api/predictions` - Get current predictions for all people\n  - `GET /api/predictions?person=<id>&horizon=<min>` - Filtered predictions\n  - `GET /api/predictions/stats` - Transition count, data age, model readiness\n  - `POST /api/predictions/recompute` - Force probability recomputation\n  - `GET /api/predictions/accuracy` - Per-person accuracy stats\n  - `GET /api/predictions/accuracy/overall` - Overall system accuracy\n  - `GET /api/predictions/accuracy/{personID}` - Person-specific accuracy\n  - `GET /api/predictions/horizon` - Monte Carlo horizon predictions\n  - `GET /api/predictions/horizon/{personID}` - Person-specific horizon prediction\n  - `GET /api/predictions/patterns/zones` - Zone occupancy patterns\n  - `GET /api/predictions/probabilities/{personID}` - Transition probabilities\n  - `GET /api/predictions/samples/{personID}/zone/{zoneID}` - Sample counts\n\n- **Main application wiring (`cmd/mothership/main.go`):**\n  - Prediction module initialization (lines 492-534)\n  - Zone transition recording on portal crossings (lines 1579-1581)\n  - Provider wiring for zones, people, positions (lines 1831-1863)\n  - MQTT client integration for prediction publishing (lines 1846-1863)\n  - Periodic prediction update loop every 60 seconds (lines 1866-1888)\n  - Periodic prediction evaluation every 30 seconds (lines 1931-1983)\n  - REST API endpoint registration (lines 2527-2888)\n\n**Constants and thresholds:**\n- MinimumDataAge = 7 days (168 hours) before predictions activate\n- MinimumSamplesPerSlot = 3 observations per time slot\n- PredictionHorizon = 15 minutes (default)\n- MonteCarloRuns = 1000 simulations\n- TargetAccuracy = 75% at 15-minute horizon\n\n**Accuracy tracking:**\n- Records predictions when made (personID, currentZone, predictedZone, confidence, horizon)\n- Evaluates pending predictions when target time is reached\n- Compares predicted zone vs actual zone\n- Computes rolling 7-day accuracy percentage\n- Reports \"meets_target\" when accuracy ≥ 75% and min predictions threshold met\n\n**Model learning:**\n- Observations recorded every 5 minutes per person/zone\n- EMA update: `p_new = p_old + α × (obs - p_old)` where α = 0.03\n- Cold start: 7 days of data required for model readiness\n- Slot ready when sample_count ≥ 3\n- Automatic recomputation triggered on zone transitions\n\n**Files created/modified:**\n```\nmothership/internal/prediction/\n├── model.go           — ModelStore, transition probabilities, dwell times\n├── predictor.go       — Predictor for presence prediction\n├── horizon.go         — HorizonPredictor with Monte Carlo simulation\n├── accuracy.go        — AccuracyTracker for prediction evaluation\n├── history.go         — HistoryUpdater for zone transition recording\n├── adapter.go         — Provider adapters for zones, people, positions\n├── model_test.go      — Tests for model store operations\n├── predictor_test.go  — Tests for prediction logic\n├── accuracy_test.go   — Tests for accuracy tracking\n└── horizon_test.go    — Tests for horizon predictions\n\nmothership/internal/api/\n├── prediction.go      — REST API handlers for predictions\n└── prediction_test.go — Tests for prediction API endpoints\n\nmothership/internal/mqtt/\n└── client.go          — MQTT client with prediction sensor publishing\n```\n\n**Acceptance criteria met:**\n- ✅
